Motivation: 研究扩散模型生成的合成图像能否在低数据条件下改进军事车辆检测，探索生成式数据作为传统仿真管道的替代方案。

Method: 使用LoRA微调FLUX.1扩散模型，每类仅用8或24张真实图像生成15类车辆合成数据；同时训练RF-DETR检测器；引入ControlNet进行结构引导生成。

Result: FLUX生成图像显著提升检测性能（8张真实样本下mAP50提升8.0%）；FLUX-CN在数据极度稀缺时进一步改善（+4.1% mAP50），但数据充足时无额外收益。

Conclusion: 特定对象的扩散模型能有效提升低数据域军事目标检测，结构引导在真实数据极度有限时最有益，生成式图像数据可作为军事AI系统训练的传统仿真替代方案。

Abstract: Diffusion-based image synthesis has emerged as a promising source of synthetic training data for AI-based object detection and classification. In this work, we investigate whether images generated with diffusion can improve military vehicle detection under low-data conditions. We fine-tuned the text-to-image diffusion model FLUX.1 [dev] using LoRA with only 8 or 24 real images per class across 15 vehicle categories, resulting in class-specific diffusion models, which were used to generate new samples from automatically generated text prompts. The same real images were used to fine-tune the RF-DETR detector for a 15-class object detection task. Synthetic datasets generated by the diffusion models were then used to further improve detector performance. Importantly, no additional real data was required, as the generative models leveraged the same limited training samples. FLUX-generated images improved detection performance, particularly in the low-data regime (up to +8.0% mAP$_{50}$ with 8 real samples). To address the limited geometric control of text prompt-based diffusion, we additionally generated structurally guided synthetic data using ControlNet with Canny edge-map conditioning, yielding a FLUX-ControlNet (FLUX-CN) dataset with explicit control over viewpoint and pose. Structural guidance further enhanced performance when data is scarce (+4.1% mAP$_{50}$ with 8 real samples), but no additional benefit was observed when more real data is available. This study demonstrates that object-specific diffusion models are effective for improving military object detection in a low-data domain, and that structural guidance is most beneficial when real data is highly limited. These results highlight generative image data as an alternative to traditional simulation pipelines for the training of military AI systems.

</details>


### [225] [Autonomous Unmanned Aircraft Systems for Enhanced Search and Rescue of Drowning Swimmers: Image-Based Localization and Mission Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18088)
*Sascha Emanuel Zell,Toni Schneidereit,Armin Fügenschuh,Michael Breuß*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于无人机系统的水上救援方案，使用YOLO进行溺水者自动检测，并通过离散事件仿真验证无人机系统能显著缩短救援响应时间


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水上溺水救援面临时间压力大、水域范围广、目标定位困难等挑战，需要技术创新来提高救援效率和响应速度

Method: 1) 使用YOLO目标检测架构自动定位溺水者，创建专用数据集并训练模型；2) 采用离散事件仿真方法模拟标准救援操作和无人机系统的响应时间

Result: YOLO各版本在溺水者检测上表现良好，无人机系统能显著缩短响应时间，即使小型无人机系统（2个机库各1架无人机）也能将响应时间减少5倍

Conclusion: 无人机系统结合自动目标检测技术能有效提升水上救援效率，为紧急情况下的快速响应提供技术解决方案

Abstract: Drowning is an omnipresent risk associated with any activity on or in the water, and rescuing a drowning person is particularly challenging because of the time pressure, making a short response time important. Further complicating water rescue are unsupervised and extensive swimming areas, precise localization of the target, and the transport of rescue personnel. Technical innovations can provide a remedy: We propose an Unmanned Aircraft System (UAS), also known as a drone-in-a-box system, consisting of a fleet of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) allocated to purpose-built hangars near swimming areas. In an emergency, the UAS can be deployed in addition to Standard Rescue Operation (SRO) equipment to locate the distressed person early by performing a fully automated Search and Rescue (S&R) operation and dropping a flotation device. In this paper, we address automatically locating distressed swimmers using the image-based object detection architecture You Only Look Once (YOLO). We present a dataset created for this application and outline the training process. We evaluate the performance of YOLO versions 3, 5, and 8 and architecture sizes (nano, extra-large) using Mean Average Precision (mAP) metrics mAP@.5 and mAP@.5:.95. Furthermore, we present two Discrete-Event Simulation (DES) approaches to simulate response times of SRO and UAS-based water rescue. This enables estimation of time savings relative to SRO when selecting the UAS configuration (type, number, and location of UAVs and hangars). Computational experiments for a test area in the Lusatian Lake District, Germany, show that UAS assistance shortens response time. Even a small UAS with two hangars, each containing one UAV, reduces response time by a factor of five compared to SRO.

</details>


### [226] [Decision-Aware Attention Propagation for Vision Transformer Explainability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18094)
*Sehyeong Jo,Gangjae Jang,Haesol Park*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出DAP方法，通过梯度定位估计token重要性并融入注意力传播，生成更类别敏感、紧凑且忠实的归因图，提升ViT可解释性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有注意力解释方法主要依赖原始注意力权重，不能明确反映最终决策且类别区分性有限；而梯度定位方法虽能突出类别特定证据，但未充分利用transformer的层次注意力传播机制

Method: 提出决策感知注意力传播(DAP)：1) 通过梯度定位方法估计token重要性；2) 将重要性信息融入层间注意力传播(attention rollout)；3) 同时捕捉注意力结构流和与最终预测最相关的证据

Result: 在不同规模的Vision Transformer变体上，DAP在定量指标和定性可视化方面均优于现有基线方法，生成的归因图更类别敏感、紧凑且忠实

Conclusion: 决策感知传播是提升ViT可解释性的有效方向，DAP方法通过结合梯度定位和注意力传播机制，解决了现有方法的局限性

Abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have become a dominant architecture in computer vision, yet their prediction process remains difficult to interpret because information is propagated through complex interactions across layers and attention heads. Existing attention based explanation methods provide an intuitive way to trace information flow. However, they rely mainly on raw attention weights, which do not explicitly reflect the final decision and often lead to explanations with limited class discriminability. In contrast, gradient based localization methods are more effective at highlighting class specific evidence, but they do not fully exploit the hierarchical attention propagation mechanism of transformers. To address this limitation, we propose Decision-Aware Attention Propagation (DAP), an attribution method that injects decision-relevant priors into transformer attention propagation. By estimating token importance through gradient based localization and integrating it into layer wise attention rollout, the method captures both the structural flow of attention and the evidence most relevant to the final prediction. Consequently, DAP produces attribution maps that are more class sensitive, compact, and faithful than those generated by conventional attention based methods. Extensive experiments across Vision Transformer variants of different model scales show that DAP consistently outperforms existing baselines in both quantitative metrics and qualitative visualizations, indicating that decision aware propagation is an effective direction for improving ViT interpretability.

</details>


### [227] [Test-Time Perturbation Learning with Delayed Feedback for Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18107)
*Zehua Zang,Xi Wang,Fuchun Sun,Xiao Xu,Lixiang Lium,Jiahuan Zhou,Jiangmeng Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PDF框架通过不确定性数据增强和延迟反馈的扰动学习，提升VLA模型在环境变化下的决策鲁棒性，无需微调基础模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉-语言-动作模型在顺序决策中表现优异，但对环境微小变化（如物体姿态变化）非常脆弱。这种脆弱性源于轨迹过拟合，即模型过度关注动作与实体之间的虚假相关性，从而复制记忆的动作模式。

Method: 提出PDF框架：1）通过基于不确定性的数据增强和动作投票来缓解虚假相关性；2）自适应调度器分配增强预算以平衡性能与效率；3）学习轻量级扰动模块，利用延迟反馈回顾性调整动作logits，纠正过度自信问题。

Result: 在LIBERO数据集上成功率提升7.4%，在Atari上人类标准化得分提升10.3%，相比原始VLA和带测试时适应的VLA均有显著提升。

Conclusion: PDF框架为多模态决策智能体提供了一种实用的测试时适应路径，无需验证器且不微调基础模型，显著提升了VLA模型在环境变化下的决策鲁棒性。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) achieve remarkable performance in sequential decision-making but remain fragile to subtle environmental shifts, such as small changes in object pose. We attribute this brittleness to trajectory overfitting, where VLAs over-attend to the spurious correlation between actions and entities, then reproduce memorized action patterns. We propose Perturbation learning with Delayed Feedback (PDF), a verifier-free test-time adaptation framework that improves decision performance without fine-tuning the base model. PDF mitigates the spurious correlation through uncertainty-based data augmentation and action voting, while an adaptive scheduler allocates augmentation budgets to balance performance and efficiency. To further improve stability, PDF learns a lightweight perturbation module that retrospectively adjusts action logits guided by delayed feedback, correcting overconfidence issue. Experiments on LIBERO (+7.4\% success rate) and Atari (+10.3 human normalized score) demonstrate consistent gains of PDF in task success over vanilla VLA and VLA with test-time adaptation, establishing a practical path toward reliable test-time adaptation in multimodal decision-making agents. The code is available at \href{https://github.com/zhoujiahuan1991/CVPR2026-PDF}{https://github.com/zhoujiahuan1991/CVPR2026-PDF}.

</details>


### [228] [Can LLM-Generated Text Empower Surgical Vision-Language Pre-training?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18134)
*Chengan Che,Chao Wang,Jiayuan Huang,Xinyue Chen,Luis C. Garcia-Peraza-Herrera*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SurgLIME：一种参数高效的视觉语言预训练框架，利用LLM生成的噪声叙述学习可靠的多模态对齐，同时保持视觉基础模型的医学先验知识。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的手术视觉编码器在多模态推理任务中受到专家文本标注成本高昂的限制，而使用LLM生成的叙述虽然可扩展但可能包含错误，会损害预训练的医学先验知识。

Method: 提出SurgLIME框架：1）使用LoRA适配的双编码器架构保持基础医学先验；2）引入自动置信度估计机制，在对比对齐中动态降低不确定文本的权重。

Result: 在AutoLaparo和Cholec80基准测试中，SurgLIME实现了竞争力的零样本跨模态对齐，同时保持了视觉基础模型的稳健线性探测性能。

Conclusion: SurgLIME能够有效利用噪声叙述进行视觉语言预训练，解决了手术领域多模态数据标注的扩展性问题，同时保护了关键的医学先验知识。

Abstract: Recent advancements in self-supervised learning have led to powerful surgical vision encoders capable of spatiotemporal understanding. However, extending these visual foundations to multi-modal reasoning tasks is severely bottlenecked by the prohibitive cost of expert textual annotations. To overcome this scalability limitation, we introduce \textbf{LIME}, a large-scale multi-modal dataset derived from open-access surgical videos using human-free, Large Language Model (LLM)-generated narratives. While LIME offers immense scalability, unverified generated texts may contain errors, including hallucinations, that could potentially lead to catastrophically degraded pre-trained medical priors in standard contrastive pipelines. To mitigate this, we propose \textbf{SurgLIME}, a parameter-efficient Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) framework designed to learn reliable cross-modal alignments using noisy narratives. SurgLIME preserves foundational medical priors using a LoRA-adapted dual-encoder architecture and introduces an automated confidence estimation mechanism that dynamically down-weights uncertain text during contrastive alignment. Evaluations on the AutoLaparo and Cholec80 benchmarks show that SurgLIME achieves competitive zero-shot cross-modal alignment while preserving the robust linear probing performance of the visual foundation model. Dataset, code, and models are publicly available at \href{https://github.com/visurg-ai/SurgLIME}{https://github.com/visurg-ai/SurgLIME}.

</details>


### [229] [Soft Label Pruning and Quantization for Large-Scale Dataset Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18135)
*Xiao Lingao,Yang He*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LPQLD通过标签剪枝和量化技术，大幅减少大规模数据集蒸馏中的软标签存储开销，同时提升模型性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模数据集蒸馏需要存储大量软标签（ImageNet-1K上30-40倍，ImageNet-21K上200倍），违背了数据集压缩的初衷。主要问题包括：图像多样性不足和高相似度导致需要大量增强，以及监督信号多样性不足导致高压缩率下性能下降。

Method: 提出LPQLD方法：1）通过类级批处理和批归一化监督增强图像多样性；2）引入动态知识重用的标签剪枝提升每个增强的标签多样性；3）使用校准师生对齐的标签量化提升每个图像的增强多样性。

Result: 在ImageNet-1K上减少软标签存储78倍，ImageNet-21K上减少500倍，同时准确率分别提升7.2%和2.8%。在不同网络架构和数据集蒸馏方法上验证了方法的优越性。

Conclusion: LPQLD有效解决了大规模数据集蒸馏中软标签存储过大的问题，通过提升图像和监督多样性，在显著减少存储需求的同时提高了模型性能。

Abstract: Large-scale dataset distillation requires storing auxiliary soft labels that can be 30-40x larger on ImageNet-1K and 200x larger on ImageNet-21K than the condensed images, undermining the goal of dataset compression. We identify two fundamental issues necessitating such extensive labels: (1) insufficient image diversity, where high within-class similarity in synthetic images requires extensive augmentation, and (2) insufficient supervision diversity, where limited variety in supervisory signals during training leads to performance degradation at high compression rates. To address these challenges, we propose Label Pruning and Quantization for Large-scale Distillation (LPQLD). We enhance image diversity via class-wise batching and batch-normalization supervision during synthesis. For supervision diversity, we introduce Label Pruning with Dynamic Knowledge Reuse to improve label-per-augmentation diversity, and Label Quantization with Calibrated Student-Teacher Alignment to improve augmentation-per-image diversity. Our approach reduces soft label storage by 78x on ImageNet-1K and 500x on ImageNet-21K while improving accuracy by up to 7.2% and 2.8%, respectively. Extensive experiments validate the superiority of LPQLD across different network architectures and dataset distillation methods. Code is available at https://github.com/he-y/soft-label-pruning-quantization-for-dataset-distillation.

</details>


### [230] [Region-Grounded Report Generation for 3D Medical Imaging: A Fine-Grained Dataset and Graph-Enhanced Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18145)
*Cong Huy Nguyen,Son Dinh Nguyen,Guanlin Li,Tuan Dung Nguyen,Aditya Narayan Sankaran,Mai Huy Thong,Thanh Trung Nguyen,Mai Hong Son,Reza Farahbakhsh,Phi Le Nguyen,Noel Crespi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 论文提出了首个针对低资源语言的大规模3D PET/CT数据集VietPET-RoI，并开发了HiRRA框架，通过模仿放射科医生工作流程，使用基于图的关系模块分析感兴趣区域，显著提升了医学报告生成的临床可靠性和准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前医学报告生成方法面临两大挑战：1）3D体积数据的高维特性与标注数据稀缺（特别是低资源语言）；2）现有黑盒方法直接将整个体积映射到报告，忽略了临床实践中分析局部感兴趣区域(RoI)来得出诊断结论的工作流程。

Method: 1）创建VietPET-RoI数据集：包含600个PET/CT样本和1,960个手动标注的RoI，配有相应临床报告；2）提出HiRRA框架：模仿专业放射科医生诊断流程，使用基于图的关系模块捕捉RoI属性间的依赖关系；3）引入新的临床评估指标：RoI覆盖率和RoI质量指数，使用LLM提取来测量RoI定位准确性和属性描述保真度。

Result: HiRRA框架在BLEU和ROUGE-L指标上分别超越现有模型19.7%和4.7%，在临床指标上实现了45.8%的显著提升，表明临床可靠性增强且幻觉减少。该框架从全局模式匹配转向局部临床发现分析。

Conclusion: 通过引入首个针对低资源语言的大规模3D PET/CT RoI数据集和模仿临床工作流程的HiRRA框架，本研究显著提升了医学报告生成的临床相关性和准确性，为低资源语言的医学AI应用提供了重要资源和方法论。

Abstract: Automated medical report generation for 3D PET/CT imaging is fundamentally challenged by the high-dimensional nature of volumetric data and a critical scarcity of annotated datasets, particularly for low-resource languages. Current black-box methods map whole volumes to reports, ignoring the clinical workflow of analyzing localized Regions of Interest (RoIs) to derive diagnostic conclusions. In this paper, we bridge this gap by introducing VietPET-RoI, the first large-scale 3D PET/CT dataset with fine-grained RoI annotation for a low-resource language, comprising 600 PET/CT samples and 1,960 manually annotated RoIs, paired with corresponding clinical reports. Furthermore, to demonstrate the utility of this dataset, we propose HiRRA, a novel framework that mimics the professional radiologist diagnostic workflow by employing graph-based relational modules to capture dependencies between RoI attributes. This approach shifts from global pattern matching toward localized clinical findings. Additionally, we introduce new clinical evaluation metrics, namely RoI Coverage and RoI Quality Index, that measure both RoI localization accuracy and attribute description fidelity using LLM-based extraction. Extensive evaluation demonstrates that our framework achieves SOTA performance, surpassing existing models by 19.7% in BLEU and 4.7% in ROUGE-L, while achieving a remarkable 45.8% improvement in clinical metrics, indicating enhanced clinical reliability and reduced hallucination. Our code and dataset are available on GitHub.

</details>


### [231] [Attention-ResUNet for Automated Fetal Head Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18148)
*Ammar Bhilwarawala,Mainak Bandyopadhyay*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Attention-ResUNet架构，结合残差学习和多尺度注意力机制，在超声图像胎儿头部分割任务上取得99.30%的Dice分数，显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 超声图像中胎儿头部自动分割对产前生物测量至关重要，但现有深度学习方法受限于低对比度、噪声和复杂解剖边界等问题。

Method: 提出Attention-ResUNet架构，在四个解码器层级集成注意力门控机制，选择性关注解剖相关区域并抑制背景噪声，同时使用残差连接促进梯度流动和特征重用。

Result: 在HC18 Challenge数据集（n=200）上，Attention-ResUNet取得99.30±0.14%的平均Dice分数，显著优于ResUNet（99.26%）、Attention U-Net（98.79%）、Swin U-Net（98.60%）、Standard U-Net（98.58%）和U-Net++（97.46%）。统计分析和显著性图显示方法具有高度解剖一致性和可解释性。

Conclusion: Attention-ResUNet为胎儿头部自动分割建立了新的最先进性能，同时保持计算效率（14.7M参数，45 GFLOPs推理成本），具有临床部署潜力。

Abstract: Automated fetal head segmentation in ultrasound images is critical for accurate biometric measurements in prenatal care. While existing deep learning approaches have achieved a reasonable performance, they struggle with issues like low contrast, noise, and complex anatomical boundaries which are inherent to ultrasound imaging. This paper presents Attention-ResUNet. It is a novel architecture that synergistically combines residual learning with multi-scale attention mechanisms in order to achieve enhanced fetal head segmentation. Our approach integrates attention gates at four decoder levels to focus selectively on anatomically relevant regions while suppressing the background noise, and complemented by residual connections which facilitates gradient flow and feature reuse. Extensive evaluation on the HC18 Challenge dataset where n = 200 demonstrates that Attention ResUNet achieves a superior performance with a mean Dice score of 99.30 +/- 0.14% against similar architectures. It significantly outperforms five baseline architectures including ResUNet (99.26%), Attention U-Net (98.79%), Swin U-Net (98.60%), Standard U-Net (98.58%), and U-Net++ (97.46%). Through statistical analysis we confirm highly significant improvements (p < 0.001) with effect sizes that range from 0.230 to 13.159 (Cohen's d). Using Saliency map analysis, we reveal that our architecture produces highly concentrated, anatomically consistent activation patterns, which demonstrate an enhanced interpretability which is crucial for clinical deployment. The proposed method establishes a new state of the art performance for automated fetal head segmentation whilst maintaining computational efficiency with 14.7M parameters and a 45 GFLOPs inference cost. Code repository: https://github.com/Ammar-ss

</details>


### [232] [AI-based Waste Mapping for Addressing Climate-Exacerbated Flood Risk](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18151)
*Steffen Knoblauch,Levi Szamek,Iddy Chazua,Benedcto Adamu,Innocent Maholi,Alexander Zipf*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AI技术利用公开航拍和街景图像检测城市固体废物，应用于达累斯萨拉姆，揭示废物空间分布模式与洪水风险关联，为城市规划和气候适应提供可操作见解


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非洲快速扩张城市面临日益严重的城市洪水灾害，不完善的废物管理系统堵塞排水系统并加剧洪水风险，需要高效监测方法

Method: 开发AI驱动的城市废物测绘工作流，利用公开可用的航拍和街景图像高分辨率检测市政固体废物，与当地合作伙伴合作确保数据标注的文化和情境相关性

Result: 水道中的废物积累量比相邻城市区域高出三倍，识别出气候加剧洪水的关键热点区域，揭示废物空间模式与贫民窟和社会经济因素的关联

Conclusion: 这种可扩展的AI方法支持全市监测和干预优先排序，为洪水易发城市地区的城市规划、气候适应和可持续废物管理提供可操作见解

Abstract: Urban flooding is a growing climate change-related hazard in rapidly expanding African cities, where inadequate waste management often blocks drainage systems and amplifies flood risks. This study introduces an AI-powered urban waste mapping workflow that leverages openly available aerial and street-view imagery to detect municipal solid waste at high resolution. Applied in Dar es Salaam, Tanzania, our approach reveals spatial waste patterns linked to informal settlements and socio-economic factors. Waste accumulation in waterways was found to be up to three times higher than in adjacent urban areas, highlighting critical hotspots for climate-exacerbated flooding. Unlike traditional manual mapping methods, this scalable AI approach allows city-wide monitoring and prioritization of interventions. Crucially, our collaboration with local partners ensured culturally and contextually relevant data labeling, reflecting real-world reuse practices for solid waste. The results offer actionable insights for urban planning, climate adaptation, and sustainable waste management in flood-prone urban areas.

</details>


### [233] [Embedding Arithmetic: A Lightweight, Tuning-Free Framework for Post-hoc Bias Mitigation in Text-to-Image Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18167)
*Venkatesh Thirugnana Sambandham,Torsten Schön*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种推理时方法，通过分析嵌入空间的几何结构来缓解文本到图像模型的社会偏见，保持提示语义和视觉上下文，同时提供可控的公平性-连贯性权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代文本到图像模型放大了有害的社会偏见，阻碍了其伦理部署。需要一种方法在缓解偏见的同时保持提示语义和视觉上下文（背景、布局和风格）的完整性。

Method: 使用嵌入算术分析偏见在嵌入空间中的结构，在不改变模型权重、提示或数据集的情况下进行校正。该方法在推理时工作，提供可控参数来调整缓解强度。提出了概念连贯性分数（CCS）来评估语义保持。

Result: 在FLUX 1.0-Dev和Stable Diffusion 3.5-Large上的实验表明，条件嵌入空间形成了复杂纠缠的流形而非解缠概念网格。该方法在提高多样性的同时保持高概念连贯性，显著优于现有基线。

Conclusion: 通过表征模型如何表示社会概念，建立了潜在空间几何理解作为实现更透明、可控和公平图像生成的原理性路径。该方法为从业者提供了细粒度控制公平性-连贯性权衡的能力。

Abstract: Modern text-to-image (T2I) models amplify harmful societal biases, challenging their ethical deployment. We introduce an inference-time method that reliably mitigates social bias while keeping prompt semantics and visual context (background, layout, and style) intact. This ensures context persistency and provides a controllable parameter to adjust mitigation strength, giving practitioners fine-grained control over fairness-coherence trade-offs. Using Embedding Arithmetic, we analyze how bias is structured in the embedding space and correct it without altering model weights, prompts, or datasets. Experiments on FLUX 1.0-Dev and Stable Diffusion 3.5-Large show that the conditional embedding space forms a complex, entangled manifold rather than a grid of disentangled concepts. To rigorously assess semantic preservation beyond the circularity and bias limitations of of CLIP scores, we propose the Concept Coherence Score (CCS). Evaluated against this robust metric, our lightweight, tuning-free method significantly outperforms existing baselines in improving diversity while maintaining high concept coherence, effectively resolving the critical fairness-coherence trade-off. By characterizing how models represent social concepts, we establish geometric understanding of latent space as a principled path toward more transparent, controllable, and fair image generation.

</details>


### [234] [Extending One-Step Image Generation from Class Labels to Text via Discriminative Text Representation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18168)
*Chenxi Zhao,Chen Zhu,Xiaokun Feng,Aiming Hao,Jiashu Zhu,Jiachen Lei,Jiahong Wu,Xiangxiang Chu,Jufeng Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将文本条件引入MeanFlow单步生成框架的方法，解决了传统训练策略下LLM文本编码器集成效果不佳的问题，首次实现了高效的文本条件合成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MeanFlow研究主要关注类别到图像的生成，但将条件从固定类别标签扩展到灵活文本输入是一个直观但未探索的方向。文本条件相比有限类别标签对模型理解能力要求更高，需要将强大的文本编码器有效集成到MeanFlow框架中。

Method: 通过分析发现，由于MeanFlow生成步骤极少（如仅一步），文本特征表示需要具备足够高的区分度。作者利用已验证具有所需语义特性的LLM文本编码器，并将MeanFlow生成过程适配到该框架中，首次实现了高效的文本条件合成。

Result: 成功将文本条件引入MeanFlow框架，实现了高效的文本条件合成。该方法在广泛使用的扩散模型上验证，显示出显著的生成性能提升。

Conclusion: 这项工作为未来文本条件MeanFlow生成研究提供了通用且实用的参考，代码已开源。

Abstract: Few-step generation has been a long-standing goal, with recent one-step generation methods exemplified by MeanFlow achieving remarkable results. Existing research on MeanFlow primarily focuses on class-to-image generation. However, an intuitive yet unexplored direction is to extend the condition from fixed class labels to flexible text inputs, enabling richer content creation. Compared to the limited class labels, text conditions pose greater challenges to the model's understanding capability, necessitating the effective integration of powerful text encoders into the MeanFlow framework. Surprisingly, although incorporating text conditions appears straightforward, we find that integrating powerful LLM-based text encoders using conventional training strategies results in unsatisfactory performance. To uncover the underlying cause, we conduct detailed analyses and reveal that, due to the extremely limited number of refinement steps in the MeanFlow generation, such as only one step, the text feature representations are required to possess sufficiently high discriminability. This also explains why discrete and easily distinguishable class features perform well within the MeanFlow framework. Guided by these insights, we leverage a powerful LLM-based text encoder validated to possess the required semantic properties and adapt the MeanFlow generation process to this framework, resulting in efficient text-conditioned synthesis for the first time. Furthermore, we validate our approach on the widely used diffusion model, demonstrating significant generation performance improvements. We hope this work provides a general and practical reference for future research on text-conditioned MeanFlow generation. The code is available at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/EMF.

</details>


### [235] [CanonSLR: Canonical-View Guided Multi-View Continuous Sign Language Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18184)
*Xu Wang,Shengeng Tang,Wan Jiang,Yaxiong Wang,Lechao Cheng,Richang Hong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出CanonSLR框架，通过正面视角引导的师生学习策略解决多视角连续手语识别问题，并构建了多视角数据集PT14-MV和CSL-MV。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有连续手语识别方法大多基于单视角设置，对现实场景中的视角变化不够鲁棒，需要开发能够处理多视角变化的方法。

Method: 1) 正面视角锚定的师生学习策略；2) 序列级软目标蒸馏减少跨视角语义差异；3) 时序运动关系增强建模运动感知的时序关系；4) 开发通用多视角手语数据构建流程。

Result: 在构建的PT14-MV和CSL-MV七视角基准测试中，CanonSLR在多视角设置下持续优于现有方法，在非正面视角上表现出更强的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: CanonSLR通过正面视角引导的框架有效解决了多视角连续手语识别问题，提出的多视角数据集为相关研究提供了新的实验基础。

Abstract: Continuous Sign Language Recognition (CSLR) has achieved remarkable progress in recent years; however, most existing methods are developed under single-view settings and thus remain insufficiently robust to viewpoint variations in real-world scenarios. To address this limitation, we propose CanonSLR, a canonical-view guided framework for multi-view CSLR. Specifically, we introduce a frontal-view-anchored teacher-student learning strategy, in which a teacher network trained on frontal-view data provides canonical temporal supervision for a student network trained on all viewpoints. To further reduce cross-view semantic discrepancy, we propose Sequence-Level Soft-Target Distillation, which transfers structured temporal knowledge from the frontal view to non-frontal samples, thereby alleviating gloss boundary ambiguity and category confusion caused by occlusion and projection variation. In addition, we introduce Temporal Motion Relational Enhancement to explicitly model motion-aware temporal relations in high-level visual features, strengthening stable dynamic representations while suppressing viewpoint-sensitive appearance disturbances. To support multi-view CSLR research, we further develop a universal multi-view sign language data construction pipeline that transforms original single-view RGB videos into semantically consistent, temporally coherent, and viewpoint-controllable multi-view sign language videos. Based on this pipeline, we extend PHOENIX-2014T and CSL-Daily into two seven-view benchmarks, namely PT14-MV and CSL-MV, providing a new experimental foundation for multi-view CSLR. Extensive experiments on PT14-MV and CSL-MV demonstrate that CanonSLR consistently outperforms existing approaches under multi-view settings and exhibits stronger robustness, especially on challenging non-frontal views.

</details>


### [236] [DiffuSAM: Diffusion Guided Zero-Shot Object Grounding for Remote Sensing Imagery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18201)
*Geet Sethi,Panav Shah,Ashutosh Gandhe,Soumitra Darshan Nayak*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种结合扩散模型与分割模型的混合管道，用于遥感图像中的目标定位，显著提升定位精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索扩散模型在遥感图像目标定位中的潜力，解决复杂场景下目标定位的挑战

Method: 提出混合管道，集成扩散模型的定位线索与最先进的分割模型（RemoteSAM和SAM3），利用生成扩散模型与基础分割模型的互补优势

Result: 实验表明管道显著提升定位性能，在Acc@0.5指标上相比现有最先进方法提升超过14%

Conclusion: 通过结合扩散模型与分割模型的混合方法，能够在复杂场景中实现鲁棒且自适应的目标定位

Abstract: Diffusion models have emerged as powerful tools for a wide range of vision tasks, including text-guided image generation and editing. In this work, we explore their potential for object grounding in remote sensing imagery. We propose a hybrid pipeline that integrates diffusion-based localization cues with state-of-the-art segmentation models such as RemoteSAM and SAM3 to obtain more accurate bounding boxes. By leveraging the complementary strengths of generative diffusion models and foundational segmentation models, our approach enables robust and adaptive object localization across complex scenes. Experiments demonstrate that our pipeline significantly improves localization performance, achieving over a 14% increase in Acc@0.5 compared to existing state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [237] [A Comparative Evaluation of Geometric Accuracy in NeRF and Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18205)
*Mikolaj Zielinski,Eryk Vykysaly,Bartlomiej Biesiada,Jan Baturo,Mateusz Capala,Dominik Belter*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出神经渲染方法的几何精度评估流程与包含19个多样场景的基准测试，弥补传统视觉指标对表面几何保真度的忽视


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经渲染方法评估主要关注生成图像的视觉质量，但忽略了表面几何的保真度。这在机器人应用中尤其关键，因为精确的几何对于抓取和物体操作等任务至关重要

Method: 开发了一个专注于几何精度的神经渲染方法评估流程，并构建了一个包含19个多样场景的基准测试集。该方法能够系统评估重建方法在表面和形状保真度方面的表现

Result: 提出了一个完整的评估框架，能够补充传统视觉指标，为神经渲染方法的几何重建质量提供系统性评估

Conclusion: 几何精度是神经渲染方法评估中不可忽视的重要维度，特别是在机器人应用场景中。提出的评估流程和基准测试为这一领域提供了重要的评估工具

Abstract: Recent advances in neural rendering have introduced numerous 3D scene representations. Although standard computer vision metrics evaluate the visual quality of generated images, they often overlook the fidelity of surface geometry. This limitation is particularly critical in robotics, where accurate geometry is essential for tasks such as grasping and object manipulation. In this paper, we present an evaluation pipeline for neural rendering methods that focuses on geometric accuracy, along with a benchmark comprising 19 diverse scenes. Our approach enables a systematic assessment of reconstruction methods in terms of surface and shape fidelity, complementing traditional visual metrics.

</details>


### [238] [Towards Symmetry-sensitive Pose Estimation: A Rotation Representation for Symmetric Object Classes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18208)
*Andreas Kriegler,Csaba Beleznai,Margrit Gelautz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出SARR表示法解决对称物体姿态估计中的方向模糊问题，通过修改三角函数结合物体对称度，获得对称解析的姿态表示，在标准CNN上实现SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对称物体在日常生活和工业中普遍存在，但其固有的方向模糊性阻碍了深度学习网络在姿态估计中的训练。现有方法通常需要设计特定损失函数和网络架构，或采用对称不变评估指标，而本文关注旋转本身的数值表示。

Method: 提出SARR表示法，通过修改三角函数结合物体形状的对称度，获得对称解析的姿态表示。该方法不需要3D模型，仅需深度图或无纹理RGB/灰度图像作为输入，使用标准CNN进行3D方向估计。

Result: 在T-LESS和ITODD两个6D姿态估计数据集上，SARR表示在视觉外观方面具有唯一性和连续性。使用对称敏感的余弦距离AR_C评估时，网络性能优于现有SOTA方法；使用传统对称不变度量时也达到满意性能。SARR训练的网络在推理时即使没有物体对称性先验知识，也优于其他旋转表示方法。

Conclusion: SARR表示法有效解决了对称物体姿态估计中的方向模糊问题，通过修改三角函数结合对称度，实现了对称解析的姿态表示，在标准CNN架构上取得了优异性能，且不需要特定网络设计或3D模型。

Abstract: Symmetric objects are common in daily life and industry, yet their inherent orientation ambiguities that impede the training of deep learning networks for pose estimation are rarely discussed in the literature. To cope with these ambiguities, existing solutions typically require the design of specific loss functions and network architectures or resort to symmetry-invariant evaluation metrics. In contrast, we focus on the numeric representation of the rotation itself, modifying trigonometric identities with the degrees of symmetry derived from the objects' shapes. We use our representation, SARR, to obtain canonic (symmetry-resolved) poses for the symmetric objects in two popular 6D pose estimation datasets, T-LESS and ITODD, where SARR is unique and continuous w.r.t. the visual appearance. This allows us to use a standard CNN for 3D orientation estimation whose performance is evaluated with the symmetry-sensitive cosine distance $\text{AR}_{\text{C}}$. Our networks outperform the state of the art using $\text{AR}_{\text{C}}$ and achieve satisfactory performance when using conventional symmetry-invariant measures. Our method does not require any 3D models but only depth, or, as part of an additional experiment, texture-less RGB/grayscale images as input. We also show that networks trained on SARR outperform the same networks trained on rotation matrices, Euler angles, quaternions, standard trigonometrics or the recently popular 6d representation -- even in inference scenarios where no prior knowledge of the objects' symmetry properties is available. Code and a visualization toolkit are available at https://github.com/akriegler/SARR .

</details>


### [239] [ESsEN: Training Compact Discriminative Vision-Language Transformers in a Low-Resource Setting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18452)
*Clayton Fields,Casey Kennington*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种轻量级视觉语言模型ESsEN，通过双塔编码器架构和卷积网络集成，在低资源环境下实现高效训练和部署，性能接近大型模型但参数更少。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视觉语言模型通常参数庞大（数十亿），不适合边缘设备或独立机器人平台等资源受限场景。现有研究缺乏针对轻量级模型和小数据集训练的方法，需要解决这一可访问性问题。

Method: 1) 采用双塔编码器架构而非单塔编码器；2) 将传统卷积网络集成到双塔Transformer架构中；3) 设计灵活的跨模态融合模块；4) 提出ESsEN模型，支持端到端训练且资源需求低。

Result: 1) 双塔编码器在低资源英语判别任务中优于单塔编码器；2) 卷积网络集成有助于构建参数高效的视觉语言模型；3) 跨模态融合模块的形状和大小可灵活变化而不影响性能；4) ESsEN模型在多个任务上性能接近其他模型，但参数大幅减少。

Conclusion: 通过系统化方法解决了轻量级视觉语言模型训练问题，提出的ESsEN模型和实验工具使视觉语言建模对更广泛的研究者群体更加可访问，特别适合资源受限环境。

Abstract: Vision-language modeling is rapidly increasing in popularity with an ever expanding list of available models. In most cases, these vision-language models have parameters in the tens of billions, which is necessary for some needs, but in many cases smaller models are necessary (e.g., on edge devices or independent robotic platforms). Unfortunately, there is little research in producing light-weight models or in training them with small datasets. Inspired by the language learning progression and data sparsity in child development, in this paper, we address both of these goals in a systematic fashion. We show that two-tower encoder models are superior to one-tower encoders in low-resource settings for discriminative English tasks. We show also that incorporating traditional convolutional networks into the two-tower transformer architecture can help produce parameter efficient vision-language models. Finally, we show that the cross-modal fusion module of two-tower encoders can vary significantly in shape and size while producing the same results. In addition, we present ESsEN, a compact vision-language model that can be trained end-to-end with relatively few resources that performs as well on several tasks with only a fraction of the parameters compared to other models. The experimental results and the tools we present here make vision-language modeling more accessible to a wider variety of researchers.

</details>


### [240] [Memorize When Needed: Decoupled Memory Control for Spatially Consistent Long-Horizon Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18215)
*Yanjun Guo,Zhengqiang Zhang,Pengfei Wang,Xinyue Liang,Zhiyuan Ma,Lei Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出解耦框架分离记忆建模与视频生成，通过轻量级独立记忆分支学习空间一致性，使用混合记忆表示和逐帧交叉注意力机制，结合相机感知门控，在减少训练成本的同时提升空间一致性和新场景生成能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将记忆建模与视频生成耦合，导致场景重访时内容不一致，探索新区域时生成能力下降，且需要大量标注数据训练。需要解决空间一致性保持与生成能力平衡的问题。

Method: 1) 解耦框架：分离记忆条件与生成模块；2) 轻量级独立记忆分支学习空间一致性；3) 混合记忆表示捕获时空线索；4) 逐帧交叉注意力机制确保每帧仅基于最相关的历史信息；5) 相机感知门控机制调节记忆与生成模块交互。

Result: 相比现有方法，本方法数据效率高，训练成本显著降低，同时在视觉质量和空间一致性方面达到最先进性能，特别是在场景重访和新区域探索方面表现优异。

Conclusion: 通过解耦记忆条件与视频生成，提出了一种高效且有效的长时域视频生成框架，在保持空间一致性的同时不牺牲新场景的生成能力，实现了更好的平衡。

Abstract: Spatially consistent long-horizon video generation aims to maintain temporal and spatial consistency along predefined camera trajectories. Existing methods mostly entangle memory modeling with video generation, leading to inconsistent content during scene revisits and diminished generative capacity when exploring novel regions, even trained on extensive annotated data. To address these limitations, we propose a decoupled framework that separates memory conditioning from generation. Our approach significantly reduces training costs while simultaneously enhancing spatial consistency and preserving the generative capacity for novel scene exploration. Specifically, we employ a lightweight, independent memory branch to learn precise spatial consistency from historical observation. We first introduce a hybrid memory representation to capture complementary temporal and spatial cues from generated frames, then leverage a per-frame cross-attention mechanism to ensure each frame is conditioned exclusively on the most spatially relevant historical information, which is injected into the generative model to ensure spatial consistency. When generating new scenes, a camera-aware gating mechanism is proposed to mediate the interaction between memory and generation modules, enabling memory conditioning only when meaningful historical references exist. Compared with the existing method, our method is highly data-efficient, yet the experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance in terms of both visual quality and spatial consistency.

</details>


### [241] [Instruction-as-State: Environment-Guided and State-Conditioned Semantic Understanding for Embodied Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18223)
*Zhen Liu,Yuhan Liu,Jinjun Wang,Jianyi Liu,Wei Song,Jingwen Fu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出S-EGIU框架，将指令理解建模为动态的"指令作为状态"变量，通过粗粒度到细粒度的状态条件化分段激活和语义细化，实现指令语义随视觉环境动态演化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLN模型将指令编码为静态全局表示，无法适应指令语义随视觉环境变化而动态演化的需求。指令含义会随着智能体视野和空间上下文的变化而改变，需要动态的指令-感知纠缠机制

Method: 提出State-Entangled Environment-Guided Instruction Understanding (S-EGIU)框架：1) 粗粒度：激活与当前观察语义对齐的指令分段；2) 细粒度：通过观察引导的token定位和上下文建模细化激活分段，在观察指导下锐化内部语义

Result: 在多个VLN基准测试中表现优异，特别是在REVERIE Test Unseen上获得+2.68% SPL增益，并在多个基准上展示了一致的效率提升

Conclusion: 将指令理解建模为动态的指令状态变量，通过状态条件化的分段激活和语义细化，实现了指令语义随感知状态的连续更新，验证了动态指令-感知纠缠的价值

Abstract: Vision-and-Language Navigation requires agents to follow natural-language instructions in visually changing environments. A central challenge is the dynamic entanglement between language and observations: the meaning of instruction shifts as the agent's field of view and spatial context evolve. However, many existing models encode the instruction as a static global representation, limiting their ability to adapt instruction meaning to the current visual context. We therefore model instruction understanding as an Instruction-as-State variable: a decision-relevant, token-level instruction state that evolves step by step conditioned on the agent's perceptual state, where the perceptual state denotes the observation-grounded navigation context at each step. To realize this principle, we introduce State-Entangled Environment-Guided Instruction Understanding (S-EGIU), a coarse-to-fine framework for state-conditioned segment activation and token-level semantic refinement. At the coarse level, S-EGIU activates the instruction segment whose semantics align with the current observation. At the fine level, it refines the activated segment through observation-guided token grounding and contextual modeling, sharpening its internal semantics under the current observation. Together, these stages maintain an instruction state that is continuously updated according to the agent's perceptual state during navigation. S-EGIU delivers strong performance on several key metrics, including a +2.68% SPL gain on REVERIE Test Unseen, and demonstrates consistent efficiency gains across multiple VLN benchmarks, underscoring the value of dynamic instruction--perception entanglement.

</details>


### [242] [OneVL: One-Step Latent Reasoning and Planning with Vision-Language Explanation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18486)
*Jinghui Lu,Jiayi Guan,Zhijian Huang,Jinlong Li,Guang Li,Lingdong Kong,Yingyan Li,Han Wang,Shaoqing Xu,Yuechen Luo,Fang Li,Chenxu Dang,Junli Wang,Tao Xu,Jing Wu,Jianhua Wu,Xiaoshuai Hao,Wen Zhang,Tianyi Jiang,Lingfeng Zhang,Lei Zhou,Yingbo Tang,Jie Wang,Yinfeng Gao,Xizhou Bu,Haochen Tian,Yihang Qiu,Feiyang Jia,Lin Liu,Yigu Ge,Hanbing Li,Yuannan Shen,Jianwei Cui,Hongwei Xie,Bing Wang,Haiyang Sun,Jingwei Zhao,Jiahui Huang,Pei Liu,Zeyu Zhu,Yuncheng Jiang,Zibin Guo,Chuhong Gong,Hanchao Leng,Kun Ma,Naiyang Wang,Guang Chen,Kuiyuan Yang,Hangjun Ye,Long Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: OneVL提出了一种统一的视觉语言架构与世界模型框架，通过双辅助解码器监督的紧凑潜在token实现一步推理和规划，在保持答案预测速度的同时超越显式思维链方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有思维链推理的自动回归特性导致延迟过高，不适合实时自动驾驶部署。潜在思维链方法试图压缩推理到连续隐藏状态，但一直无法超越显式方法，因为纯语言潜在表示压缩的是世界的符号抽象，而非实际控制驾驶的因果动态。

Method: 提出OneVL框架，通过双辅助解码器监督紧凑潜在token：语言解码器重建文本思维链，视觉世界模型解码器预测未来帧token，强制潜在空间内化道路几何、智能体运动和环境变化的因果动态。采用三阶段训练流程逐步对齐轨迹、语言和视觉目标。

Result: 在四个基准测试中，OneVL成为首个超越显式思维链的潜在思维链方法，在保持答案预测速度的同时实现最先进精度，证明在语言和世界模型双重监督下的更紧密压缩能产生比逐token推理更通用的表示。

Conclusion: 通过语言和世界模型双重监督的紧凑潜在表示能够有效内化驾驶的因果动态，在保持实时推理速度的同时超越显式思维链方法，为自动驾驶的实时部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has become a powerful driver of trajectory prediction in VLA-based autonomous driving, yet its autoregressive nature imposes a latency cost that is prohibitive for real-time deployment. Latent CoT methods attempt to close this gap by compressing reasoning into continuous hidden states, but consistently fall short of their explicit counterparts. We suggest that this is due to purely linguistic latent representations compressing a symbolic abstraction of the world, rather than the causal dynamics that actually govern driving. Thus, we present OneVL (One-step latent reasoning and planning with Vision-Language explanations), a unified VLA and World Model framework that routes reasoning through compact latent tokens supervised by dual auxiliary decoders. Alongside a language decoder that reconstructs text CoT, we introduce a visual world model decoder that predicts future-frame tokens, forcing the latent space to internalize the causal dynamics of road geometry, agent motion, and environmental change. A three-stage training pipeline progressively aligns these latents with trajectory, language, and visual objectives, ensuring stable joint optimization. At inference, the auxiliary decoders are discarded and all latent tokens are prefilled in a single parallel pass, matching the speed of answer-only prediction. Across four benchmarks, OneVL becomes the first latent CoT method to surpass explicit CoT, delivering state-of-the-art accuracy at answer-only latency, and providing direct evidence that tighter compression, when guided in both language and world-model supervision, produces more generalizable representations than verbose token-by-token reasoning. Project Page: https://xiaomi-embodied-intelligence.github.io/OneVL

</details>


### [243] [Is SAM3 ready for pathology segmentation?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18225)
*Qiuyu Kong,Shakiba Sharifi,Zanxi Ruan,Yiming Wang,Marco Cristani*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SAM3在病理图像分割中的能力评估：文本提示对核概念激活效果差，性能对视觉提示类型和数量敏感，few-shot学习有提升但缺乏鲁棒性，与任务专用模型仍有显著差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数字病理分割在组织和细胞核尺度上面临高标注成本和泛化能力差的问题，SAM3的可提示概念分割技术提供了通过文本提示实现自动化的潜力，需要系统评估其在病理图像分割中的实际能力。

Method: 提出系统评估协议，在不同监督设置下评估SAM3：零样本、少样本和监督学习，使用不同提示策略，在NuInsSeg、PanNuke和GlaS等病理数据集上进行广泛评估。

Result: 1. 文本提示对核概念激活效果差；2. 性能对视觉提示类型和数量高度敏感；3. 少样本学习有提升但缺乏对视觉提示噪声的鲁棒性；4. 基于提示的方法与任务训练适配器方法存在显著差距。

Conclusion: 研究界定了SAM3在病理图像分割中的能力边界，表明需要病理领域适应，提示式方法目前无法替代专门训练的模型，为实际应用提供了指导。

Abstract: Is Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM3) capable in segmenting Any Pathology Images? Digital pathology segmentation spans tissue-level and nuclei-level scales, where traditional methods often suffer from high annotation costs and poor generalization. SAM3 introduces Promptable Concept Segmentation, offering a potential automated interface via text prompts. With this work, we propose a systematic evaluation protocol to explore the capability space of SAM3 in a structured manner. Specifically, we evaluate SAM3 under different supervision settings including zero-shot, few-shot, and supervised with varying prompting strategies. Our extensive evaluation on pathological datasets including NuInsSeg, PanNuke and GlaS, reveals that: 1.text-only prompts poorly activate nuclear concepts. 2.performance is highly sensitive to visual prompt types and budgets. 3.few-shot learning offers gains, but SAM3 lacks robustness against visual prompt noise. and 4.a significant gap persists between prompt-based usage and task-trained adapter-based reference. Our study delineates SAM3's boundaries in pathology image segmentation and provides practical guidance on the necessity of pathology domain adaptation.

</details>


### [244] [Medical Image Understanding Improves Survival Prediction via Visual Instruction Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18250)
*Xixi Liu,Jorge Lazo,Andreas Hallqvist,Mikael Johansson,Åse Johnsson,Jonas S Andersson,Ella Äng Eklund,Patrik Sund,Nasser Hosseini,Jennifer Alvén,Ida Häggström*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一个基于视觉语言框架的3D CT图像理解方法，通过视觉指令调优利用大规模开源CT图像与放射报告进行预训练，然后适配到生存预测任务，在CT图像和临床数据上提升生存预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确的预后和风险评估对临床决策至关重要。放射科医生评估的CT特征虽然能提供疾病严重程度和预后的重要指标，但图像解读需要专业知识，且将丰富的视觉信息转化为文本摘要会导致信息丢失。

Method: 提出一个视觉语言框架，通过视觉指令调优利用大规模开源CT图像与放射报告进行预训练，学习临床有意义的视觉-文本表示，然后在预训练模型上加入生存预测头，适配到下游生存预测任务。

Result: 实验结果表明，该方法在生存预测任务上优于基线方法，特别是在临床数据单独预测能力较弱的情况下表现更佳，同时能生成对预设问题的临床有意义语言响应。

Conclusion: 提出的视觉语言框架能有效提升CT图像和临床数据的生存预测性能，特别是在临床数据预测能力有限时，同时保持生成临床有意义语言响应的能力。

Abstract: Accurate prognostication and risk estimation are essential for guiding clinical decision-making and optimizing patient management. While radiologist-assessed features from CT scans provide valuable indicators of disease severity and outcomes, interpreting such images requires expert knowledge, and translating rich visual information into textual summaries inevitably leads to information loss. In this work, we propose a vision-language framework for 3D CT image understanding that leverages large-scale open-sourced CT images paired with radiology reports through visual instruction tuning. This pre-training enables the model to learn clinically meaningful visual-textual representations, which can then be adapted to downstream survival prediction tasks. By incorporating a survival prediction head on top of the pre-trained model, our approach improves survival prediction from CT images and clinical data while generating clinically meaningful language responses to predefined questions. Experimental results demonstrate that our method outperforms baseline methods in survival prediction, particularly, when clinical data alone is less predictive. The code will be released upon acceptance.

</details>


### [245] [Style-Based Neural Architectures for Real-Time Weather Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18251)
*Hamed Ouattara,Pascal Houssam Salmane,Pierre Duthon,Frédéric Bernardin,Omar Ait Aider*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了三种用于天气条件实时分类的神经网络架构，基于风格迁移思想，通过多尺度PatchGAN、截断ResNet50以及结合Gram矩阵和注意力机制的改进模型，在多个公开数据集上取得了优于现有方法的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 本文旨在开发能够实时从图像中分类天气条件（晴天、雨、雪、雾）的神经网络模型。动机是利用风格迁移领域的最新进展，捕捉图像中的风格元素，因为天气条件往往表现为图像的整体风格特征而非具体对象内容。

Method: 提出了三种架构：1) Multi-PatchGAN：基于PatchGAN架构，采用多种patch尺寸适应检测任务；2) Truncated ResNet50：通过进化算法确定只保留前9层的简化ResNet50，提取高频特征捕捉风格细节；3) Truncated ResNet50 with Gram Matrix and Attention：在训练时计算每层的Gram矩阵，并通过注意力机制自动加权，优化最相关风格特征的提取。

Result: 后两种模型在多个公开数据库上超越了现有技术水平，表现出卓越的泛化能力。虽然专门为天气检测设计，但这些架构也适用于其他基于外观的分类任务。

Conclusion: 提出的三种神经网络架构成功实现了天气条件的实时分类，其中结合Gram矩阵和注意力机制的截断ResNet50模型表现最佳。这些模型不仅适用于天气检测，还可扩展到动物物种识别、纹理分类、医学影像疾病检测和工业缺陷识别等广泛的应用领域。

Abstract: In this paper, we present three neural network architectures designed for real-time classification of weather conditions (sunny, rain, snow, fog) from images. These models, inspired by recent advances in style transfer, aim to capture the stylistic elements present in images. One model, called "Multi-PatchGAN", is based on PatchGANs used in well-known architectures such as Pix2Pix and CycleGAN, but here adapted with multiple patch sizes for detection tasks. The second model, "Truncated ResNet50", is a simplified version of ResNet50 retaining only its first nine layers. This truncation, determined by an evolutionary algorithm, facilitates the extraction of high-frequency features essential for capturing subtle stylistic details. Finally, we propose "Truncated ResNet50 with Gram Matrix and Attention", which computes Gram matrices for each layer during training and automatically weights them via an attention mechanism, thus optimizing the extraction of the most relevant stylistic expressions for classification. These last two models outperform the state of the art and demonstrate remarkable generalization capability on several public databases. Although developed for weather detection, these architectures are also suitable for other appearance-based classification tasks, such as animal species recognition, texture classification, disease detection in medical imaging, or industrial defect identification.

</details>


### [246] [Domain-Specialized Object Detection via Model-Level Mixtures of Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18256)
*Svetlana Pavlitska,Malte Stüven,Beyza Keskin,J. Marius Zöllner*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于目标检测的混合专家模型，通过结合在语义不相关数据子集上训练的YOLO检测器，并利用学习的门控网络动态加权专家贡献，在BDD100K数据集上超越了传统集成方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 混合专家模型在图像分类和语义分割中已成功应用，但在目标检测中仍有限制，主要因为密集和结构化预测融合的挑战。本文旨在探索模型级目标检测器混合，提升目标检测的性能和可解释性。

Method: 提出MoE架构，结合在语义不相关数据子集上训练的YOLO检测器，使用学习的门控网络动态加权专家贡献。研究了不同的检测输出融合策略和门控机制训练方法，包括防止专家崩溃的平衡损失。

Result: 在BDD100K数据集上的实验表明，提出的MoE方法持续优于标准集成方法，并揭示了专家在不同领域的专业化特性。

Conclusion: 模型级混合专家模型是传统目标检测集成方法的可行替代方案，能同时提升性能和可解释性。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models provide a structured approach to combining specialized neural networks and offer greater interpretability than conventional ensembles. While MoEs have been successfully applied to image classification and semantic segmentation, their use in object detection remains limited due to challenges in merging dense and structured predictions. In this work, we investigate model-level mixtures of object detectors and analyze their suitability for improving performance and interpretability in object detection. We propose an MoE architecture that combines YOLO-based detectors trained on semantically disjoint data subsets, with a learned gating network that dynamically weights expert contributions. We study different strategies for fusing detection outputs and for training the gating mechanism, including balancing losses to prevent expert collapse. Experiments on the BDD100K dataset demonstrate that the proposed MoE consistently outperforms standard ensemble approaches and provides insights into expert specialization across domains, highlighting model-level MoEs as a viable alternative to traditional ensembling for object detection. Our code is available at https://github.com/KASTEL-MobilityLab/mixtures-of-experts/.

</details>


### [247] [Long-Text-to-Image Generation via Compositional Prompt Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18258)
*Jen-Yuan Huang,Tong Lin,Yilun Du*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PRISM是一种新的文本到图像生成方法，通过轻量级模块提取长提示的组成表示，让预训练模型能处理长序列输入，在保持保真度的同时实现更好的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本到图像模型在处理描述性段落时难以捕捉关键细节，因为训练数据主要是简短标题。现有方法要么微调模型但泛化能力差，要么将长输入压缩到正常提示空间但损失保真度。

Method: PRISM使用轻量级模块从长提示中提取组成表示，让T2I模型为每个组件独立进行噪声预测，然后通过基于能量的连接将输出合并到单个去噪步骤中。

Result: PRISM在多种模型架构上表现优异，性能与在相同训练数据上微调的模型相当，在超过500个token的挑战性基准测试中比基线模型高出7.4%。

Conclusion: PRISM提供了一种组合式方法，使预训练文本到图像模型能够有效处理长序列输入，在保持生成质量的同时实现更好的泛化能力。

Abstract: While modern text-to-image (T2I) models excel at generating images from intricate prompts, they struggle to capture the key details when the inputs are descriptive paragraphs. This limitation stems from the prevalence of concise captions that shape their training distributions. Existing methods attempt to bridge this gap by either fine-tuning T2I models on long prompts, which generalizes poorly to longer lengths; or by projecting the oversize inputs into normal-prompt space and compromising fidelity. We propose Prompt Refraction for Intricate Scene Modeling (PRISM), a compositional approach that enables pre-trained T2I models to process long sequence inputs. PRISM uses a lightweight module to extract constituent representations from the long prompts. The T2I model makes independent noise predictions for each component, and their outputs are merged into a single denoising step using energy-based conjunction. We evaluate PRISM across a wide range of model architectures, showing comparable performances to models fine-tuned on the same training data. Furthermore, PRISM demonstrates superior generalization, outperforming baseline models by 7.4% on prompts over 500 tokens in a challenging public benchmark.

</details>


### [248] [Geometry-Guided 3D Visual Token Pruning for Video-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18260)
*Han Li,Zehao Huang,Jiahui Fu,Naiyan Wang,Si Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Geo3DPruner：一种几何引导的3D视觉token剪枝框架，通过建模跨帧相关性并进行两阶段剪枝（体素内和体素间），在剪除90%视觉token的同时保持超过90%的原始性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型在2D视觉上表现出色，但扩展到3D场景理解时面临挑战。现有方法将3D场景表示为包含深度和相机位姿信息的空间视频，但大量视觉token成为推理效率和上下文管理的主要瓶颈。现有剪枝方法忽视了空间视频的视图一致性和剩余token的空间多样性，无法有效去除帧间冗余并保持场景完整性。

Method: 提出Geo3DPruner框架：1）通过几何感知全局注意力建模跨帧相关性；2）两阶段剪枝过程：体素内阶段选择每个体素内的代表性多视角特征，体素间阶段通过选择全局分布的体素子集来保持空间多样性。

Result: 在多个3D场景理解基准测试中，Geo3DPruner在剪除90%视觉token的同时，保持了超过90%的原始性能，显著优于现有的文本引导和视觉引导剪枝方法。

Conclusion: Geo3DPruner通过几何引导的剪枝策略有效解决了3D空间视频中视觉token过多的问题，在保持场景完整性的同时大幅提升推理效率，为3D场景理解任务提供了高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Multimodal large language models have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in 2D vision, motivating their extension to 3D scene understanding. Recent studies represent 3D scenes as 3D spatial videos composed of image sequences with depth and camera pose information, enabling pre-trained video-language models to perform 3D reasoning tasks. However, the large number of visual tokens in spatial videos remains a major bottleneck for efficient inference and context management. Existing pruning methods overlook the view consistency of spatial videos and the spatial diversity of the remaining tokens, which prevents them from effectively removing inter-frame redundancy and preserving scene completeness. In this paper, we propose Geo3DPruner, a Geometry-Guided 3D Visual Token Pruning framework. Geo3DPruner first models cross-frame relevance through geometry-aware global attention, and then performs a two-stage pruning process. The intra-voxel stage selects representative multi-view features within each voxel, while the inter-voxel stage preserves spatial diversity by selecting a globally distributed subset of voxels. Extensive experiments on multiple 3D scene understanding benchmarks demonstrate that Geo3DPruner retains over 90% of the original performance while pruning 90% of visual tokens, significantly outperforming existing text-guided and vision-guided pruning methods.

</details>


### [249] [MARCO: Navigating the Unseen Space of Semantic Correspondence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18267)
*Claudia Cuttano,Gabriele Trivigno,Carlo Masone,Stefan Roth*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MARCO提出了一种统一的可泛化语义对应模型，通过粗到细训练目标和自蒸馏框架，将稀疏关键点监督扩展为密集语义对应，在多个基准上取得SOTA，同时比扩散方法更小更快。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于DINOv2和扩散骨干的双编码器模型虽然准确，但参数庞大且泛化能力差，仅在训练关键点上表现良好，而在真实场景中查询点很少与训练点匹配，存在基准性能与实际可用性之间的差距。

Method: 基于DINOv2构建统一模型，采用粗到细训练目标提升空间精度，结合自蒸馏框架将稀疏监督扩展到标注区域之外，将少量关键点转化为密集语义对应。

Result: 在SPair-71k、AP-10K和PF-PASCAL上达到新SOTA，在细粒度定位阈值上提升8.9 PCK@0.01，在未见关键点上泛化能力最强（+5.1 SPair-U），在未见类别上提升4.7 MP-100，同时比扩散方法小3倍、快10倍。

Conclusion: MARCO通过创新的训练框架实现了细粒度定位和语义泛化的双重提升，为语义对应任务提供了更实用、高效的解决方案，弥合了基准性能与实际应用之间的差距。

Abstract: Recent advances in semantic correspondence rely on dual-encoder architectures, combining DINOv2 with diffusion backbones. While accurate, these billion-parameter models generalize poorly beyond training keypoints, revealing a gap between benchmark performance and real-world usability, where queried points rarely match those seen during training. Building upon DINOv2, we introduce MARCO, a unified model for generalizable correspondence driven by a novel training framework that enhances both fine-grained localization and semantic generalization. By coupling a coarse-to-fine objective that refines spatial precision with a self-distillation framework, which expands sparse supervision beyond annotated regions, our approach transforms a handful of keypoints into dense, semantically coherent correspondences. MARCO sets a new state of the art on SPair-71k, AP-10K, and PF-PASCAL, with gains that amplify at fine-grained localization thresholds (+8.9 PCK@0.01), strongest generalization to unseen keypoints (+5.1, SPair-U) and categories (+4.7, MP-100), while remaining 3x smaller and 10x faster than diffusion-based approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/visinf/MARCO .

</details>


### [250] [LiquidTAD: An Efficient Method for Temporal Action Detection via Liquid Neural Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18274)
*Zepeng Sun,Naichuan Zheng,Hailun Xia,Junjie Wu,Liwei Bao,Xiaotai Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LiquidTAD：首个并行化LNN架构用于时序动作检测，通过CfC公式实现线性复杂度，参数量减少63%的同时保持高精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于Transformer的TAD方法存在二次计算复杂度和参数冗余问题，限制了在资源受限环境中的部署

Method: 提出LiquidTAD框架，用并行化的ActionLiquid块替代自注意力层，采用封闭形式连续时间公式实现并行化操作，保持连续时间动态的物理先验

Result: 在THUMOS-14上达到69.46%平均mAP，仅需10.82M参数（比ActionFormer减少63%），在ActivityNet-1.3和Ego4D上也表现出最优精度-效率权衡

Conclusion: LiquidTAD通过并行化LNN架构实现了线性复杂度，显著提升了TAD的效率，同时保持了高精度，推动了现代TAD框架的帕累托前沿

Abstract: Temporal Action Detection (TAD) in untrimmed videos is currently dominated by Transformer-based architectures. While high-performing, their quadratic computational complexity and substantial parameter redundancy limit deployment in resource-constrained environments. In this paper, we propose LiquidTAD, a novel parameter-efficient framework that replaces cumbersome self-attention layers with parallelized ActionLiquid blocks. Unlike traditional Liquid Neural Networks (LNNs) that suffer from sequential execution bottlenecks, LiquidTAD leverages a closed-form continuous-time (CfC) formulation, allowing the model to be reformulated as a parallelizable operator while preserving the intrinsic physical prior of continuous-time dynamics. This architecture captures complex temporal dependencies with $O(N)$ linear complexity and adaptively modulates temporal sensitivity through learned time-constants ($τ$), providing a robust mechanism for handling varying action durations. To the best of our knowledge, this work is the first to introduce a parallelized LNN-based architecture to the TAD domain. Experimental results on the THUMOS-14 dataset demonstrate that LiquidTAD achieves a highly competitive Average mAP of 69.46\% with only 10.82M parameters -- a 63\% reduction compared to the ActionFormer baseline. Further evaluations on ActivityNet-1.3 and Ego4D benchmarks confirm that LiquidTAD achieves an optimal accuracy-efficiency trade-off and exhibits superior robustness to temporal sampling variations, advancing the Pareto frontier of modern TAD frameworks.

</details>


### [251] [Spike-NVPT: Learning Robust Visual Prompts via Bio-Inspired Temporal Filtering and Discretization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18284)
*Qiugang Zhan,Anning Jiang,Ran Tao,Ao Ma,Xiangyu Zhang,Xiurui Xie,Guisong Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Spike-NVPT方法，利用脉冲神经元设计信号过滤层和离散化单元，生成稀疏二进制提示，在保持准确性的同时显著提升视觉提示调优的噪声鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉提示调优方法虽然参数高效，但学习的连续密集提示容易对输入噪声敏感，会过度拟合任务无关细节，需要在准确性和鲁棒性之间权衡。

Method: 1. 基于脉冲神经元的信号过滤层：使用积分发放机制积累任务相关信号并过滤瞬时噪声波动；2. 脉冲离散化单元：将过滤后的信号转换为稀疏二进制提示，作为强正则化器；3. 生成的二进制提示在部署时保持静态，推理时零额外计算开销。

Result: Spike-NVPT在噪声鲁棒性方面表现优异，相比传统方法最大提升11.2%，同时在干净数据集上保持竞争力。这是首次将脉冲神经元用于微调传统ANN视觉模型。

Conclusion: 提出的Spike-NVPT方法通过脉冲神经元机制有效解决了视觉提示调优中的噪声敏感问题，实现了准确性和鲁棒性的良好平衡，为参数高效微调提供了新思路。

Abstract: Pre-trained vision models have found widespread application across diverse domains. Prompt tuning-based methods have emerged as a parameter-efficient paradigm for adapting pre-trained vision models. While effective on standard benchmarks, the continuous and dense nature of learned prompts can lead to sensitivity against input noise, as the high-capacity prompts tend to overfit task-irrelevant details. To address this trade-off, we propose Spike-NVPT, a noise-robust visual prompt tuning method. Specifically, we design a Signal Filtering Layer based on spiking neurons, which uses the integrate-and-fire (IF) mechanism to accumulate task-relevant signals over time and filter transient noise fluctuations. A subsequent Spike Discretization Unit converts filtered signals into sparse binary prompts. This discretization acts as a strong regularizer, forcing the model to anchor decision boundaries on the most discriminative and robust features. Notably, the resulting binary prompts remain static during deployment, ensuring zero additional computational overhead during inference. Experimental results demonstrate that Spike-NVPT achieves superior robustness performance, with a maximum improvement of 11.2% over conventional methods, and retains competitive accuracy on clean datasets. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to leverage spiking neurons for fine-tuning traditional artificial neural network (ANN)-based visual models.

</details>


### [252] [Denoise and Align: Diffusion-Driven Foreground Knowledge Prompting for Open-Vocabulary Temporal Action Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18313)
*Sa Zhu,Wanqian Zhang,Lin Wang,Jinchao Zhang,Cong Wang,Bo Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DFAlign是首个利用扩散去噪生成前景知识来指导动作-视频对齐的开放词汇时序动作检测框架，通过语义统一条件化、背景抑制去噪和前景提示对齐三个模块，在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开放词汇时序动作检测方法难以平衡简洁抽象的动作标签与丰富复杂的视频内容之间的语义差异，导致语义噪声和误导性的跨模态对齐。需要解决动作语义与视频表示之间的有效对齐问题。

Method: 提出DFAlign框架，采用"条件化、去噪和对齐"的三步流程：1) 语义统一条件化模块统一动作共享和动作特定语义作为扩散去噪条件；2) 背景抑制去噪模块通过去噪过程逐步去除视频背景冗余，生成前景知识；3) 前景提示对齐模块将提取的前景知识作为提示令牌注入文本表示，引导模型关注动作相关片段。

Result: 在两个开放词汇时序动作检测基准测试中取得了最先进的性能，证明了方法的有效性。前景知识作为视频和文本表示之间的中间语义锚点，有效缓解了语义差距并增强了动作相关片段的区分性。

Conclusion: DFAlign通过扩散去噪生成的前景知识作为中间语义锚点，有效缓解了动作语义与视频内容之间的语义不平衡问题，实现了更精确的跨模态对齐，为开放词汇时序动作检测提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Open-Vocabulary Temporal Action Detection (OV-TAD) aims to localize and classify action segments of unseen categories in untrimmed videos, where effective alignment between action semantics and video representations is critical for accurate detection. However, existing methods struggle to mitigate the semantic imbalance between concise, abstract action labels and rich, complex video contents, inevitably introducing semantic noise and misleading cross-modal alignment. To address this challenge, we propose DFAlign, the first framework that leverages diffusion-based denoising to generate foreground knowledge for the guidance of action-video alignment. Following the 'conditioning, denoising and aligning' manner, we first introduce the Semantic-Unify Conditioning (SUC) module, which unifies action-shared and action-specific semantics as conditions for diffusion denoising. Then, the Background-Suppress Denoising (BSD) module generates foreground knowledge by progressively removing background redundancy from videos through denoising process. This foreground knowledge serves as effective intermediate semantic anchor between video and text representations, mitigating the semantic gap and enhancing the discriminability of action-relevant segments. Furthermore, we introduce the Foreground-Prompt Alignment (FPA) module to inject extracted foreground knowledge as prompt tokens into text representations, guiding model's attention towards action-relevant segments and enabling precise cross-modal alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on two OV-TAD benchmarks. The code repository is provided as follows: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Code-2114/.

</details>


### [253] [EVE: Verifiable Self-Evolution of MLLMs via Executable Visual Transformations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18320)
*Yongrui Heng,Chaoya Jiang,Han Yang,Shikun Zhang,Wei Ye*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EVE框架通过可执行的视觉变换实现多模态大语言模型的自进化，避免伪标签质量退化问题，采用挑战者-求解者双策略架构，通过动态生成Python脚本进行视觉变换，确保答案绝对正确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM自进化方法存在局限：伪标签方法因模型预测漂移导致质量逐步退化，模板方法局限于静态变换集无法适应难度和多样性变化。需要一种不依赖模型内部确定性、具有外部反馈机制并能持续多样化训练分布的方法。

Method: 提出EVE框架，采用挑战者-求解者双策略架构。挑战者维护并扩展视觉变换代码示例队列，合成Python脚本执行动态视觉变换，生成具有执行验证真实答案的VQA问题。多维奖励系统整合语义多样性和动态难度校准，引导挑战者丰富代码队列并逐步增加任务难度。

Result: 大量实验表明EVE持续超越现有自进化方法，建立了可验证的MLLM自进化稳健且可扩展的范式。

Conclusion: EVE通过可执行视觉变换完全绕过伪标签，利用持续丰富的视觉变换实现多模态大语言模型的稳健、连续自进化，为MLLM自进化提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Self-evolution of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) remains a critical challenge: pseudo-label-based methods suffer from progressive quality degradation as model predictions drift, while template-based methods are confined to a static set of transformations that cannot adapt in difficulty or diversity. We contend that robust, continuous self-improvement requires not only deterministic external feedback independent of the model's internal certainty, but also a mechanism to perpetually diversify the training distribution. To this end, we introduce EVE (Executable Visual transformation-based self-Evolution), a novel framework that entirely bypasses pseudo-labels by harnessing executable visual transformations continuously enriched in both variety and complexity. EVE adopts a Challenger-Solver dual-policy architecture. The Challenger maintains and progressively expands a queue of visual transformation code examples, from which it synthesizes novel Python scripts to perform dynamic visual transformations. Executing these scripts yields VQA problems with absolute, execution-verified ground-truth answers, eliminating any reliance on model-generated supervision. A multi-dimensional reward system integrating semantic diversity and dynamic difficulty calibration steers the Challenger to enrich its code example queue while posing progressively more challenging tasks, preventing mode collapse and fostering reciprocal co-evolution between the two policies. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EVE consistently surpasses existing self-evolution methods, establishing a robust and scalable paradigm for verifiable MLLM self-evolution. The code is available at https://github.com/0001Henry/EVE .

</details>


### [254] [OmniHuman: A Large-scale Dataset and Benchmark for Human-Centric Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18326)
*Lei Zhu,Xing Cai,Yingjie Chen,Yiheng Li,Binxin Yang,Hao Liu,Jie Chen,Chen Li,Jing LYu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了OmniHuman数据集和OHBench基准，用于解决现有音频-视频联合生成模型在复杂真实场景中生成高保真人类中心视频的挑战，通过分层标注和自动化流水线提升人类建模的精细度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有音频-视频联合生成模型在复杂真实物理场景中生成高保真人类中心视频仍面临重大挑战。研究发现根本原因在于现有数据集在三个维度存在结构缺陷：全局场景和相机多样性有限、交互建模稀疏（人-人和人-物）、个体属性对齐不足。

Method: 提出了OmniHuman大规模多场景数据集，提供分层标注（视频级场景、帧级交互、个体级属性），并开发了高质量数据收集和多模态标注的完全自动化流水线。同时建立了OmniHuman Benchmark（OHBench）三级评估系统。

Result: OHBench引入了与人类感知高度一致的评估指标，填补了现有基准的空白，提供了跨全局场景、关系交互和个体属性的全面诊断能力。

Conclusion: OmniHuman数据集和OHBench基准通过解决现有数据集的三个关键缺陷，为人类中心音频-视频合成提供了科学诊断工具，显著提升了复杂真实场景中人类建模的精细度和评估的全面性。

Abstract: Recent advancements in audio-video joint generation models have demonstrated impressive capabilities in content creation. However, generating high-fidelity human-centric videos in complex, real-world physical scenes remains a significant challenge. We identify that the root cause lies in the structural deficiencies of existing datasets across three dimensions: limited global scene and camera diversity, sparse interaction modeling (both person-person and person-object), and insufficient individual attribute alignment. To bridge these gaps, we present OmniHuman, a large-scale, multi-scene dataset designed for fine-grained human modeling. OmniHuman provides a hierarchical annotation covering video-level scenes, frame-level interactions, and individual-level attributes. To facilitate this, we develop a fully automated pipeline for high-quality data collection and multi-modal annotation. Complementary to the dataset, we establish the OmniHuman Benchmark (OHBench), a three-level evaluation system that provides a scientific diagnosis for human-centric audio-video synthesis. Crucially, OHBench introduces metrics that are highly consistent with human perception, filling the gaps in existing benchmarks by providing a comprehensive diagnosis across global scenes, relational interactions, and individual attributes.

</details>


### [255] [AdaCluster: Adaptive Query-Key Clustering for Sparse Attention in Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18348)
*Haoyue Tan,Shengnan Wang,Yulin Qiao,Juncheng Zhang,Youhui Bai,Ping Gong,Zewen Jin,Cheng Li*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AdaCluster：一种无需训练的自适应聚类框架，通过角度相似性保持的查询聚类和欧氏相似性保持的键聚类，加速视频扩散Transformer推理，在保持精度的同时实现1.67-4.31倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视频扩散Transformer（DiTs）由于二次注意力复杂度导致推理延迟过高。现有稀疏注意力方法要么忽略语义相似性，要么无法适应不同层的异构token分布，导致模型性能下降。

Method: 提出AdaCluster训练免费自适应聚类框架：1）对查询向量应用角度相似性保持聚类以获得更高压缩率；2）对键设计欧氏相似性保持聚类方法，包括聚类数量分配、阈值自适应聚类和高效关键聚类选择。

Result: 在CogVideoX-2B、HunyuanVideo和Wan-2.1模型上，单张A40 GPU测试显示达到1.67-4.31倍加速，质量下降可忽略不计。

Conclusion: AdaCluster能有效加速视频扩散Transformer推理，在保持模型精度的同时显著降低计算复杂度，解决了现有稀疏注意力方法的局限性。

Abstract: Video diffusion transformers (DiTs) suffer from prohibitive inference latency due to quadratic attention complexity. Existing sparse attention methods either overlook semantic similarity or fail to adapt to heterogeneous token distributions across layers, leading to model performance degradation. We propose AdaCluster, a training-free adaptive clustering framework that accelerates the generation of DiTs while preserving accuracy. AdaCluster applies an angle-similarity-preserving clustering method to query vectors for higher compression, and designs a euclidean-similarity-preserving clustering method for keys, covering cluster number assignment, threshold-wise adaptive clustering, and efficient critical cluster selection. Experiments on CogVideoX-2B, HunyuanVideo, and Wan-2.1 on one A40 GPU demonstrate up to 1.67-4.31x speedup with negligible quality degradation.

</details>


### [256] [LBFTI: Layer-Based Facial Template Inversion for Identity-Preserving Fine-Grained Face Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18358)
*Zixuan Shen,Zhihua Xia,Kaikai Gan,Peipeng Yu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LBFTI是一种分层面部模板反演方法，通过将人脸分解为前景、中景和背景三层，采用三阶段训练策略，实现了从面部模板重建身份保持的细粒度人脸图像，在机器认证和人类感知相似性方面均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 面部模板在身份认证中被广泛采用，符合数据最小化原则，但现有的模板反演技术存在严重的隐私泄露风险，能够从模板重建人脸图像，因此需要开发更有效的反演方法来评估和防范这种风险。

Method: LBFTI将人脸图像分解为三层：前景层（眉毛、眼睛、鼻子、嘴巴）、中景层（皮肤）和背景层（其他部分）。采用三阶段训练策略：1）独立精细生成前景和中景层；2）融合前景和中景层并注入模板信息，生成包含背景层的完整全景人脸；3）联合微调所有模块以优化层间协调和身份一致性。

Result: 实验表明，LBFTI在机器认证性能上优于现有方法，TAR提升了25.3%，同时在人类感知相似性方面也表现更好，通过定量指标和问卷调查验证了其优越性。

Conclusion: LBFTI方法通过分层生成和三阶段训练策略，成功实现了从面部模板重建高质量、身份保持的人脸图像，在机器和人类评估指标上都超越了现有方法，为面部模板隐私风险评估提供了有效工具。

Abstract: In face recognition systems, facial templates are widely adopted for identity authentication due to their compliance with the data minimization principle. However, facial template inversion technologies have posed a severe privacy leakage risk by enabling face reconstruction from templates. This paper proposes a Layer-Based Facial Template Inversion (LBFTI) method to reconstruct identity-preserving fine-grained face images. Our scheme decomposes face images into three layers: foreground layers (including eyebrows, eyes, nose, and mouth), midground layers (skin), and background layers (other parts). LBFTI leverages dedicated generators to produce these layers, adopting a rigorous three-stage training strategy: (1) independent refined generation of foreground and midground layers, (2) fusion of foreground and midground layers with template secondary injection to produce complete panoramic face images with background layers, and (3) joint fine-tuning of all modules to optimize inter-layer coordination and identity consistency. Experiments demonstrate that our LBFTI not only outperforms state-of-the-art methods in machine authentication performance, with a 25.3% improvement in TAR, but also achieves better similarity in human perception, as validated by both quantitative metrics and a questionnaire survey.

</details>


### [257] [EAST: Early Action Prediction Sampling Strategy with Token Masking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18367)
*Iva Sović,Ivan Martinović,Marin Oršić*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EAST框架通过随机化训练策略，使单个模型能适应不同观测比例，结合联合学习和token masking技术，在早期动作预测任务上取得SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 早期动作预测面临视觉证据有限的挑战，需要模型能够从不完整观察中进行推理。

Method: 提出随机化训练策略，采样时间步分隔观测和未观测帧；采用联合学习同时学习观测和未来表示；提出token masking减少内存使用并加速训练。

Result: 在NTU60、SSv2和UCF101数据集上分别超越之前最佳工作10.1、7.7和3.9个百分点，内存减半，训练加速2倍。

Conclusion: EAST框架通过简单有效的设计解决了早期动作预测的关键挑战，实现了优异的性能和可扩展性。

Abstract: Early action prediction seeks to anticipate an action before it fully unfolds, but limited visual evidence makes this task especially challenging. We introduce EAST, a simple and efficient framework that enables a model to reason about incomplete observations. In our empirical study, we identify key components when training early action prediction models. Our key contribution is a randomized training strategy that samples a time step separating observed and unobserved video frames, enabling a single model to generalize seamlessly across all test-time observation ratios. We further show that joint learning on both observed and future (oracle) representations significantly boosts performance, even allowing an encoder-only model to excel. To improve scalability, we propose a token masking procedure that cuts memory usage in half and accelerates training by 2x with negligible accuracy loss. Combined with a forecasting decoder, EAST sets a new state of the art on NTU60, SSv2, and UCF101, surpassing previous best work by 10.1, 7.7, and 3.9 percentage points, respectively.

</details>


### [258] [DSA-CycleGAN: A Domain Shift Aware CycleGAN for Robust Multi-Stain Glomeruli Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18368)
*Zeeshan Nisar,Friedrich Feuerhake,Thomas Lampert*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Domain Shift Aware CycleGAN (DSA-CycleGAN)来解决数字病理学中多染色分割的噪声问题，相比传统CycleGAN在染色转换时能减少噪声，提升肾小球分割性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数字病理学分割面临的主要挑战是染色间和染色内的变异，这会降低模型性能。由于为每种染色标注数据昂贵耗时，现有方法使用CycleGAN进行染色转换，但CycleGAN在转换时容易引入噪声，特别是对于某些染色对的一对多性质，这与循环一致性损失相冲突

Method: 提出Domain Shift Aware CycleGAN (DSA-CycleGAN)，专门设计来减少染色转换过程中的噪声。该方法考虑了染色间的域偏移问题，并与其他机器学习方法进行比较评估

Result: 实验表明DSA-CycleGAN不仅提高了肾小球分割的性能，而且在减少噪声方面优于其他方法。特别是在生物学上不同的染色之间转换时效果更加明显

Conclusion: DSA-CycleGAN有效解决了多染色分割中的噪声问题，特别是在处理生物学差异较大的染色对时表现优异，为数字病理学分割提供了一种更可靠的染色转换方法

Abstract: A key challenge in segmentation in digital histopathology is inter- and intra-stain variations as it reduces model performance. Labelling each stain is expensive and time-consuming so methods using stain transfer via CycleGAN, have been developed for training multi-stain segmentation models using labels from a single stain. Nevertheless, CycleGAN tends to introduce noise during translation because of the one-to-many nature of some stain pairs, which conflicts with its cycle consistency loss. To address this, we propose the Domain Shift Aware CycleGAN, which reduces the presence of such noise. Furthermore, we evaluate several advances from the field of machine learning aimed at resolving similar problems and compare their effectiveness against DSA-CycleGAN in the context of multi-stain glomeruli segmentation. Experiments demonstrate that DSA-CycleGAN not only improves segmentation performance in glomeruli segmentation but also outperforms other methods in reducing noise. This is particularly evident when translating between biologically distinct stains. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/zeeshannisar/DSA-CycleGAN.

</details>


### [259] [Towards Robust Text-to-Image Person Retrieval: Multi-View Reformulation for Semantic Compensation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18376)
*Chao Yuan,Yujian Zhao,Haoxuan Xu,Guanglin Niu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出基于大语言模型的语义补偿框架(MVR)，通过多视角语义重构和特征补偿解决文本到图像人物检索中的表达漂移问题，无需训练即可提升原模型性能并在三个数据集上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在文本到图像人物检索任务中，自然语言表达的多样性和视觉语义的隐含性导致表达漂移问题：语义等价的文本由于表达方式不同在嵌入空间中产生显著特征差异，从而降低图像-文本对齐的鲁棒性。

Method: 提出基于大语言模型的语义补偿框架(MVR)，包含三个核心组件：1)多视角重构(MVR)：双分支提示策略结合关键特征引导和多样性感知重写，生成语义等价但分布多样的文本变体；2)文本特征鲁棒性增强：通过多视角特征均值池化和残差连接的无训练潜在空间补偿机制，抑制噪声干扰并捕获"语义回声"；3)视觉语义补偿：利用VLM生成多视角图像描述，并通过共享文本重构进一步增强以解决视觉语义差距。

Result: 实验表明，该方法无需训练即可显著提升原始模型的准确性，在三个文本到图像人物检索数据集上达到最先进的性能。

Conclusion: 提出的MVR框架通过多视角语义重构和特征补偿有效解决了表达漂移问题，增强了跨模态表示的一致性，为文本到图像人物检索提供了有效的无训练增强方案。

Abstract: In text-to-image person retrieval tasks, the diversity of natural language expressions and the implicitness of visual semantics often lead to the problem of Expression Drift, where semantically equivalent texts exhibit significant feature discrepancies in the embedding space due to phrasing variations, thereby degrading the robustness of image-text alignment. This paper proposes a semantic compensation framework (MVR) driven by Large Language Models (LLMs), which enhances cross-modal representation consistency through multi-view semantic reformulation and feature compensation. The core methodology comprises three components: Multi-View Reformulation (MVR): A dual-branch prompting strategy combines key feature guidance (extracting visually critical components via feature similarity) and diversity-aware rewriting to generate semantically equivalent yet distributionally diverse textual variants; Textual Feature Robustness Enhancement: A training-free latent space compensation mechanism suppresses noise interference through multi-view feature mean-pooling and residual connections, effectively capturing "Semantic Echoes"; Visual Semantic Compensation: VLM generates multi-perspective image descriptions, which are further enhanced through shared text reformulation to address visual semantic gaps. Experiments demonstrate that our method can improve the accuracy of the original model well without training and performs SOTA on three text-to-image person retrieval datasets.

</details>


### [260] [One-Step Diffusion with Inverse Residual Fields for Unsupervised Industrial Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18393)
*Boan Zhang,Wen Li,Guanhua Yu,Xiyang Liu,Wenchao Chen,Long Tian*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出OSD-IRF方法，通过单步扩散和逆残差场实现快速工业异常检测，在保持SOTA性能的同时提升2倍推理速度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型在工业异常检测中性能优秀但推理速度慢，需要解决速度瓶颈问题

Method: 首先训练DDPM模型，然后基于噪声估计预测逆残差场(IRF)，最后通过IRF的高斯分布概率密度进行异常检测

Result: 在三个广泛使用的uIAD基准测试中，在六个指标上达到SOTA或竞争性性能，推理速度提升约2倍

Conclusion: OSD-IRF通过单步扩散和逆残差场空间实现了快速准确的工业异常检测，发现异常在IRF空间中具有可区分性

Abstract: Diffusion models have achieved outstanding performance in unsupervised industrial anomaly detection (uIAD) by learning a manifold of normal data under the common assumption that off-manifold anomalies are harder to generate, resulting in larger reconstruction errors in data space or lower probability densities in the tractable latent space. However, their iterative denoising and noising nature leads to slow inference. In this paper, we propose OSD-IRF, a novel one-step diffusion with inverse residual fields, to address this limitation for uIAD task. We first train a deep diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM) on normal data without any conditioning. Then, for a test sample, we predict its inverse residual fields (IRF) based on the noise estimated by the well-trained parametric noise function of the DDPM. Finally, uIAD is performed by evaluating the probability density of the IRF under a Gaussian distribution and comparing it with a threshold. Our key observation is that anomalies become distinguishable in this IRF space, a finding that has seldom been reported in prior works.
