Motivation: 现有离散扩散语言模型的启发式采样策略效率低下，每次只采样少量token，存在很大改进空间。token采样顺序优化具有显著的加速潜力

Method: 提出Neural Indicator Sampling框架，使用神经网络指示器决定每步采样哪些token，并设计轨迹保持目标函数来训练指示器

Result: 在LLaDA和Dream模型上，相比全步采样实现高达14.3倍加速，性能下降可忽略；在准确率-步数权衡中持续优于置信度阈值采样

Conclusion: NI Sampling框架有效优化离散扩散语言模型的token采样顺序，显著提升采样效率，为扩散语言模型的实际应用提供了重要改进

Abstract: Discrete diffusion language models (dLLMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to traditional autoregressive approaches, offering the flexibility to generate tokens in arbitrary orders and the potential of parallel decoding. However, existing heuristic sampling strategies remain inefficient: they choose only a small part of tokens to sample at each step, leaving substantial room for improvement. In this work, we study the problem of token sampling order optimization and demonstrate its significant potential for acceleration. Specifically, we find that fully leveraging correct predictions at each step can reduce the number of sampling iterations by an order of magnitude without compromising accuracy. Based on this, we propose Neural Indicator Sampling (NI Sampling), a general sampling order optimization framework that utilize a neural indicator to decide which tokens should be sampled at each step. We further propose a novel trajectory-preserving objective to train the indicator. Experiments on LLaDA and Dream models across multiple benchmarks show that our method achieves up to 14.3$\times$ acceleration over full-step sampling with negligible performance drop, and consistently outperforms confidence threshold sampling in the accuracy-step trade-off. Code is available at https://github.com/imagination-research/NI-Sampling.

</details>


### [901] [Train Separately, Merge Together: Modular Post-Training with Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18473)
*Jacob Morrison,Sanjay Adhikesaven,Akshita Bhagia,Matei Zaharia,Noah A. Smith,Sewon Min*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BAR提出模块化训练框架，通过独立训练领域专家并组合成MoE架构，解决传统整体训练扩展性差、成本高的问题，实现线性成本扩展且不损害现有能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统语言模型扩展存在根本性限制：从头训练成本高昂且扩展性差，而持续训练通常会损害现有能力。需要一种更高效、可扩展的方法来为预训练模型添加新领域能力。

Method: BAR框架包含三个关键部分：1）为每个领域独立训练专家（包括中期训练、监督微调和强化学习）；2）采用混合专家架构组合这些专家；3）通过轻量级路由器训练实现专家组合。这种方法支持独立更新专家，成本线性增长。

Result: 在7B规模上，针对数学、代码、工具使用和安全四个领域，BAR获得49.1的综合得分，匹配或超过重新训练基线（47.8无中期训练，50.5有中期训练）。模块化训练避免了灾难性遗忘，显著降低了更新或添加领域的成本和复杂性。

Conclusion: 解耦的、基于专家的训练是扩展语言模型的可扩展替代方案，相比整体重新训练具有结构优势，支持独立专家更新，成本线性增长，且不损害现有能力。

Abstract: Extending a fully post-trained language model with new domain capabilities is fundamentally limited by monolithic training paradigms: retraining from scratch is expensive and scales poorly, while continued training often degrades existing capabilities. We present BAR (Branch-Adapt-Route), which trains independent domain experts, each through its own mid-training, supervised finetuning, and reinforcement learning pipeline, and composes them via a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with lightweight router training. Unlike retraining approaches that mix all domains and require full reprocessing for any update (with cost scaling quadratically), BAR enables updating individual experts independently with linear cost scaling and no degradation to existing domains. At the 7B scale, with experts for math, code, tool use, and safety, BAR achieves an overall score of 49.1 (averaged across 7 evaluation categories), matching or exceeding re-training baselines (47.8 without mid-training, 50.5 with). We further show that modular training provides a structural advantage: by isolating each domain, it avoids the catastrophic forgetting that occurs when late-stage RL degrades capabilities from earlier training stages, while significantly reducing the cost and complexity of updating or adding a domain. Together, these results suggest that decoupled, expert-based training is a scalable alternative to monolithic retraining for extending language models.

</details>


### [902] [Multi-Scale Reversible Chaos Game Representation: A Unified Framework for Sequence Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18477)
*Sarwan Ali,Taslim Murad*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出MS-RCGR编码框架，将生物序列转换为可逆的多分辨率几何表示，结合传统机器学习、计算机视觉和混合方法提升分类性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物分类的可解释性仍然是一个挑战，需要一种能够保留完整序列信息并支持多种分析方法的编码框架。

Method: 提出多尺度可逆混沌游戏表示(MS-RCGR)，使用有理算术和分层k-mer分解生成尺度不变特征，结合三种分析范式：传统机器学习、计算机视觉模型和混合方法。

Result: 在合成DNA和蛋白质数据集上，MS-RCGR特征在所有三种范式中都提升了分类性能，特别是混合方法（预训练语言模型嵌入+MS-RCGR特征）表现最优。

Conclusion: MS-RCGR为生物序列分析提供了一个灵活、可解释且高性能的基础框架，其可逆性确保无信息损失，多尺度分析能捕获从单个核苷酸到复杂基序结构的模式。

Abstract: Biological classification with interpretability remains a challenging task. For this, we introduce a novel encoding framework, Multi-Scale Reversible Chaos Game Representation (MS-RCGR), that transforms biological sequences into multi-resolution geometric representations with guaranteed reversibility. Unlike traditional sequence encoding methods, MS-RCGR employs rational arithmetic and hierarchical k-mer decomposition to generate scale-invariant features that preserve complete sequence information while enabling diverse analytical approaches. Our framework bridges three distinct paradigms for sequence analysis: (1) traditional machine learning using extracted geometric features, (2) computer vision models operating on CGR-generated images, and (3) hybrid approaches combining protein language model embeddings with CGR features. Through comprehensive experiments on synthetic DNA and protein datasets encompassing seven distinct sequence classes, we demonstrate that MS-RCGR features consistently enhance classification performance across all paradigms. Notably, our hybrid approach combining pre-trained language model embeddings (ESM2, ProtT5) with MS-RCGR features achieves superior performance compared to either method alone. The reversibility property of our encoding ensures no information loss during transformation, while multi-scale analysis captures patterns ranging from individual nucleotides to complex motif structures. Our results indicate that MS-RCGR provides a flexible, interpretable, and high-performing foundation for biological sequence analysis.

</details>


### [903] [Faster by Design: Interactive Aerodynamics via Neural Surrogates Trained on Expert-Validated CFD](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18491)
*Nicholas Thumiger,Andrea Bartezzaghi,Mattia Rigotti,Cezary Skura,Thomas Frick,Elisa Serioli,Fabrizio Arbucci,A. Cristiano I. Malossi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出GIST图神经网络算子，在赛车空气动力学数据集上实现高精度预测，支持交互式设计空间探索


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统CFD计算成本过高（数万核小时/次），限制了赛车空气动力学设计空间探索；现有AI代理模型数据集过于简单，缺乏赛车特有的复杂几何特征

Method: 1) 创建基于LMP2级赛车CAD模型的高保真RANS数据集；2) 提出GIST图神经网络算子，通过谱嵌入编码网格连接性，保证离散不变性并线性扩展

Result: GIST在公开基准和赛车数据集上均达到最先进精度，预测精度满足早期空气动力学设计要求，首次验证了工业赛车工作流中交互式设计空间探索的可行性

Conclusion: GIST结合高质量赛车数据集，为工业赛车空气动力学提供了实用的AI代理模型，实现了用代理模型替代CFD求解器进行交互式设计探索的概念验证

Abstract: Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) is central to race-car aerodynamic development, yet its cost -- tens of thousands of core-hours per high-fidelity evaluation -- severely limits the design space exploration feasible within realistic budgets. AI-based surrogate models promise to alleviate this bottleneck, but progress has been constrained by the limited complexity of public datasets, which are dominated by smoothed passenger-car shapes that fail to exercise surrogates on the thin, complex, highly loaded components governing motorsport performance. This work presents three primary contributions. First, we introduce a high-fidelity RANS dataset built on a parametric LMP2-class CAD model and spanning six operating conditions (map points) covering straight-line and cornering regimes, generated and validated by aerodynamics experts at Dallara to preserve features relevant to industrial motorsport. Second, we present the Gauge-Invariant Spectral Transformer (GIST), a graph-based neural operator whose spectral embeddings encode mesh connectivity to enhance predictions on tightly packed, complex geometries. GIST guarantees discretization invariance and scales linearly with mesh size, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy on both public benchmarks and the proposed race-car dataset. Third, we demonstrate that GIST achieves a level of predictive accuracy suitable for early-stage aerodynamic design, providing a first validation of the concept of interactive design-space exploration -- where engineers query a surrogate in place of the CFD solver -- within industrial motorsport workflows.

</details>


### [904] [Barrier-enforced multi-objective optimization for direct point and sharp interval forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18492)
*Worachit Amnuaypongsa,Yotsapat Suparanonrat,Pana Wanitchollakit,Jitkomut Songsiri*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个多步概率预测框架，使用单一神经网络模型同时生成点预测和区间预测，通过多目标优化确保预测区间不交叉且满足目标覆盖率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖手动调整损失函数权重来平衡点预测和区间预测，需要试错调参，且难以同时保证预测区间不交叉和满足目标覆盖率

Method: 采用多梯度下降进行多目标优化，提出基于扩展对数障碍的自适应超参数PI损失函数，构建共享时序模型与特定时间跨度子模型的混合架构

Result: 在日内太阳辐照度预测应用中，提出的损失函数始终优于现有方法，以最窄的区间宽度实现目标覆盖率，且与LSTM编码器-解码器和Transformer架构相比保持高度竞争力

Conclusion: 该框架消除了多目标平衡的试错调参，提出的损失函数具有尺度无关性和普适性，可无缝适配任何深度学习结构

Abstract: This paper proposes a multi-step probabilistic forecasting framework using a single neural-network based model to generate simultaneous point and interval forecasts. Our approach ensures non-crossing prediction intervals (PIs) through a model structure design that strictly satisfy a target coverage probability (PICP) while maximizing sharpness. Unlike existing methods that rely on manual weight tuning for scalarized loss functions, we treat point and PI forecasting as a multi-objective optimization problem, utilizing multi-gradient descent to adaptively select optimal weights. Key innovations include a new PI loss function based on an extended log-barrier with an adaptive hyperparameter to guarantee the coverage, a hybrid architecture featuring a shared temporal model with horizon-specific submodels, and a training strategy. The proposed loss is scale-independent and universally applicable; combined with our training algorithm, the framework eliminates trial-and-error hyperparameter tuning for balancing multiple objectives. Validated by an intra-day solar irradiance forecasting application, results demonstrate that our proposed loss consistently outperforms those in current literature by achieving target coverage with the narrowest PI widths. Furthermore, when compared against LSTM encoder-decoder and Transformer architectures--including those augmented with Chronos foundation models--our method remains highly competitive and can be seamlessly adapted to any deep learning structure.

</details>


### [905] [Too Correct to Learn: Reinforcement Learning on Saturated Reasoning Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18493)
*Zhenwen Liang,Yujun Zhou,Sidi Lu,Xiangliang Zhang,Haitao Mi,Dong Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出CUTS解码策略和Mixed-CUTS训练框架，解决强化学习微调大语言模型时因基准测试饱和导致的模式崩溃问题，通过强制多样性探索提升泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当大语言模型规模增大时，基础模型在标准基准测试（如MATH）上已接近饱和，产生正确但同质化的解决方案。这导致基于组相对优势的强化学习算法（如GRPO）中的优势信号消失，引发策略模式崩溃，限制了模型的泛化能力。

Method: 提出CUTS（Constrained Uniform Top-K Sampling），一种无参数的解码策略，通过从受限的高置信度候选中均匀采样来强制保持结构化的探索。进一步提出Mixed-CUTS训练框架，结合利用性和探索性rollouts来增强组内优势方差。

Result: 在Qwen3模型上的实验表明，该方法能有效防止策略退化，显著提升领域外泛化能力。在具有挑战性的AIME25基准测试上，Mixed-CUTS比标准GRPO提高了15.1%的Pass@1准确率。

Conclusion: 在语义流形内保持多样性对于严谨推理至关重要，CUTS和Mixed-CUTS通过强制结构化探索解决了强化学习微调中的模式崩溃问题，显著提升了模型的泛化性能。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) enhances LLM reasoning, yet a paradox emerges as models scale: strong base models saturate standard benchmarks (e.g., MATH), yielding correct but homogeneous solutions. In such environments, the lack of failure cases causes the advantage signal in group-relative algorithms (e.g., GRPO) to vanish, driving policies into mode collapse. To address this, we propose Constrained Uniform Top-K Sampling (CUTS), a parameter-free decoding strategy enforcing structure-preserving exploration. Unlike standard sampling that follows model biases, CUTS flattens the local optimization landscape by sampling uniformly from constrained high-confidence candidates. We integrate this into Mixed-CUTS, a training framework synergizing exploitative and exploratory rollouts to amplify intra-group advantage variance. Experiments on Qwen3 models demonstrate that our approach prevents policy degeneration and significantly boosts out-of-domain generalization. Notably, Mixed-CUTS improves Pass@1 accuracy on the challenging AIME25 benchmark by up to 15.1% over standard GRPO, validating that maintaining diversity within the semantic manifold is critical for rigorous reasoning.

</details>


### [906] [IDOBE: Infectious Disease Outbreak forecasting Benchmark Ecosystem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18521)
*Aniruddha Adiga,Jingyuan Chou,Anshul Chiranth,Bryan Lewis,Ana I. Bento,Shaun Truelove,Geoffrey Fox,Madhav Marathe,Harry Hochheiser,Srini Venkatramanan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: IDOBE是一个用于传染病暴发预测的标准化基准数据集，包含超过10,000个暴发事件的时间序列数据，覆盖13种疾病，并提供了11种基线模型的性能评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传染病暴发预测已成为实时疫情应对的重要组成部分，但目前缺乏标准化的基准数据集来评估预测方法，特别是对于历史数据有限的新发疫情，现有方法的性能了解不足。

Method: 1) 从多个数据源收集超过一个世纪的流行病学时间序列数据；2) 使用基于导数的分割方法生成超过10,000个暴发事件；3) 应用信息论和分布度量量化数据集的流行病学多样性；4) 使用11种基线模型进行多时间尺度短期预测(1-4周前)；5) 使用NMSE、MAPE和NWIS等指标评估性能。

Result: MLP-based方法表现最稳健，统计方法在暴发前峰期略有优势。数据集和基线模型已公开在GitHub上，支持标准化、可复现的暴发预测方法基准测试。

Conclusion: IDOBE提供了一个全面的暴发预测基准数据集，填补了标准化评估工具的空白，有助于推动传染病预测方法的发展，特别是在历史数据有限的新发疫情场景下。

Abstract: Epidemic forecasting has become an integral part of real-time infectious disease outbreak response. While collaborative ensembles composed of statistical and machine learning models have become the norm for real-time forecasting, standardized benchmark datasets for evaluating such methods are lacking. Further, there is limited understanding on performance of these methods for novel outbreaks with limited historical data. In this paper, we propose IDOBE, a curated collection of epidemiological time series focused on outbreak forecasting. IDOBE compiles from multiple data repositories spanning over a century of surveillance and across U.S. states and global locations. We perform derivative-based segmentation to generate over 10,000 outbreaks covering multiple outcomes such as cases and hospitalizations for 13 diseases. We consider a variety of information-theoretic and distributional measures to quantify the epidemiological diversity of the dataset. Finally, we perform multi-horizon short-term forecasting (1- to 4-week-ahead) through the progression of the outbreak using 11 baseline models and report on their performance. In addition to standard metrics such as NMSE and MAPE for point forecasts, we include probabilistic scoring rules such as Normalized Weighted Interval Score (NWIS) to quantify the performance. We find that MLP-based methods have the most robust performance, with statistical methods having a slight edge during the pre-peak phase. IDOBE dataset along with baselines are released publicly on https://github.com/NSSAC/IDOBE to enable standardized, reproducible benchmarking of outbreak forecasting methods.

</details>


### [907] [Wasserstein Distributionally Robust Risk-Sensitive Estimation via Conditional Value-at-Risk](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18546)
*Feras Al Taha,Eilyan Bitar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种分布鲁棒的风险敏感估计方法，在Wasserstein模糊集内最小化最坏情况CVaR，通过半定规划可精确计算，在电力价格预测中表现优于现有方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统估计方法通常假设已知精确的概率分布，但在实际应用中分布往往未知或有不确定性。需要一种能处理分布不确定性的鲁棒估计方法，特别是在风险敏感的应用场景中。

Method: 提出分布鲁棒的风险敏感估计框架：1) 使用type-2 Wasserstein球定义分布模糊集；2) 以条件风险价值(CVaR)作为估计误差的度量；3) 寻找最小化最坏情况CVaR的仿射估计器；4) 当名义分布有限支撑时，通过半定规划精确计算最优估计器。

Result: 理论证明当名义分布有限支撑时，最优仿射估计器可通过求解半定规划精确计算。在真实电力市场数据的批发电价预测任务中，所提方法相比现有方法具有更低的样本外CVaR平方误差。

Conclusion: 该方法为处理分布不确定性的风险敏感估计问题提供了有效的计算框架，在电力价格预测等实际应用中展现出优越性能，为鲁棒统计估计提供了新工具。

Abstract: We propose a distributionally robust approach to risk-sensitive estimation of an unknown signal x from an observed signal y. The unknown signal and observation are modeled as random vectors whose joint probability distribution is unknown, but assumed to belong to a given type-2 Wasserstein ball of distributions, termed the ambiguity set. The performance of an estimator is measured according to the conditional value-at-risk (CVaR) of the squared estimation error. Within this framework, we study the problem of computing affine estimators that minimize the worst-case CVaR over all distributions in the given ambiguity set. As our main result, we show that, when the nominal distribution at the center of the Wasserstein ball is finitely supported, such estimators can be exactly computed by solving a tractable semidefinite program. We evaluate the proposed estimators on a wholesale electricity price forecasting task using real market data and show that they deliver lower out-of-sample CVaR of squared error compared to existing methods.

</details>


### [908] [Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Biological $2\mathrm{D}{+}t$ Reaction-Diffusion Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18548)
*William Lavery,Jodie A. Cochrane,Christian Olesen,Dagim S. Tadele,John T. Nardini,Sara Hamis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 扩展BINNs到2D+t系统，结合数据预处理、BINN方程学习和符号回归后处理，从肺癌细胞显微数据中发现反应-扩散方程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有BINNs仅限于1D+t反应-扩散系统，且主要用于前向预测而非方程识别。需要扩展到2D+t系统，并开发从实验数据中发现控制方程的完整框架。

Method: 提出一个结合数据预处理、BINN方程学习和符号回归后处理的PINN框架。BINNs保持已知微分算子结构（如反应-扩散），通过可训练神经子网络学习本构项，并使用软残差惩罚。

Result: 成功将框架应用于肺癌细胞群体动力学的延时显微数据，从实验观测中恢复了2D+t反应-扩散模型，展示了实际应用价值。

Conclusion: 该框架可扩展到其他时空系统，为从数据中快速发现解析方程提供了实用且可解释的工具。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) provide a powerful framework for learning governing equations of dynamical systems from data. Biologically-informed neural networks (BINNs) are a variant of PINNs that preserve the known differential operator structure (e.g., reaction-diffusion) while learning constitutive terms via trainable neural subnetworks, enforced through soft residual penalties. Existing BINN studies are limited to $1\mathrm{D}{+}t$ reaction-diffusion systems and focus on forward prediction, using the governing partial differential equation as a regulariser rather than an explicit identification target. Here, we extend BINNs to $2\mathrm{D}{+}t$ systems within a PINN framework that combines data preprocessing, BINN-based equation learning, and symbolic regression post-processing for closed-form equation discovery. We demonstrate the framework's real-world applicability by learning the governing equations of lung cancer cell population dynamics from time-lapse microscopy data, recovering $2\mathrm{D}{+}t$ reaction-diffusion models from experimental observations. The proposed framework is readily applicable to other spatio-temporal systems, providing a practical and interpretable tool for fast analytic equation discovery from data.

</details>


### [909] [A Note on TurboQuant and the Earlier DRIVE/EDEN Line of Work](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18555)
*Ran Ben-Basat,Yaniv Ben-Itzhak,Gal Mendelson,Michael Mitzenmacher,Amit Portnoy,Shay Vargaftik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文澄清了TurboQuant与早期DRIVE和EDEN量化方案的关系，指出TurboQuant是EDEN的特例或次优组合，实验表明EDEN在所有设置下都优于TurboQuant。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 澄清TurboQuant与早期量化方案DRIVE和EDEN之间的关系，指出TurboQuant实际上是这些已有方法的特例或次优组合，而非全新的创新。

Method: 通过理论分析比较TurboQuant与EDEN的量化机制：1) TurboQuant_mse是固定S=1的EDEN特例；2) TurboQuant_prod是(b-1)位EDEN与1位QJL残差量化的次优组合；3) 分析两者在随机旋转、Beta分布、Lloyd-Max算法等技术上的相似性。

Result: 实验证明：1) 带优化S的偏置EDEN比TurboQuant_mse更准确；2) 无偏EDEN显著优于TurboQuant_prod，通常能节省超过1位精度（如2位EDEN优于3位TurboQuant_prod）；3) 在所有TurboQuant论文的实验设置中，EDEN都表现更优。

Conclusion: TurboQuant本质上是EDEN量化方案的特例或次优变体，EDEN在理论上更优且在实验中表现更好，TurboQuant并未提供超越已有方案的实际优势。

Abstract: This note clarifies the relationship between the recent TurboQuant work and the earlier DRIVE (NeurIPS 2021) and EDEN (ICML 2022) schemes. DRIVE is a 1-bit quantizer that EDEN extended to any $b>0$ bits per coordinate; we refer to them collectively as EDEN.
  First, TurboQuant$_{\text{mse}}$ is a special case of EDEN obtained by fixing EDEN's scalar scale parameter to $S=1$. EDEN supports both biased and unbiased quantization, each optimized by a different $S$ (chosen via methods described in the EDEN works). The fixed choice $S=1$ used by TurboQuant is generally suboptimal, although the optimal $S$ for biased EDEN converges to $1$ as the dimension grows; accordingly TurboQuant$_{\text{mse}}$ approaches EDEN's behavior for large $d$.
  Second, TurboQuant$_{\text{prod}}$ combines a biased $(b-1)$-bit EDEN step with an unbiased 1-bit QJL quantization of the residual. It is suboptimal in three ways: (1) its $(b-1)$-bit step uses the suboptimal $S=1$; (2) its 1-bit unbiased residual quantization has worse MSE than (unbiased) 1-bit EDEN; (3) chaining a biased $(b-1)$-bit step with a 1-bit unbiased residual step is inferior to unbiasedly quantizing the input directly with $b$-bit EDEN.
  Third, some of the analysis in the TurboQuant work mirrors that of the EDEN works: both exploit the connection between random rotations and the shifted Beta distribution, use the Lloyd-Max algorithm, and note that Randomized Hadamard Transforms can replace uniform random rotations.
  Experiments support these claims: biased EDEN (with optimized $S$) is more accurate than TurboQuant$_{\text{mse}}$, and unbiased EDEN is markedly more accurate than TurboQuant$_{\text{prod}}$, often by more than a bit (e.g., 2-bit EDEN beats 3-bit TurboQuant$_{\text{prod}}$). We also repeat all accuracy experiments from the TurboQuant paper, showing that EDEN outperforms it in every setup we have tried.

</details>


### [910] [Latent Phase-Shift Rollback: Inference-Time Error Correction via Residual Stream Monitoring and KV-Cache Steering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18567)
*Manan Gupta,Dhruv Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出LPSR方法，通过监测残差流中的相位偏移来检测推理错误，并回滚KV缓存注入修正向量，无需微调或额外前向传播，显著提升数学推理性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在推理过程中经常出现不可恢复的错误：一旦出现错误步骤，后续token会加剧错误而非修正。现有方法如提示自校正效果不佳，甚至低于标准自回归生成。

Method: LPSR（Latent Phase-Shift Rollback）：在每个生成步骤监测关键层lcrit的残差流，通过余弦相似度+熵的双重门控检测方向突变（相位偏移），检测到错误时回滚KV缓存并注入预计算的转向向量。无需微调、梯度计算或额外前向传播。

Result: 在MATH-500上，8B模型达到44.0%准确率，比标准自回归（28.8%）提升15.2个百分点。显著优于提示自校正（19.8%）和Best-of-16方法，且token成本降低5.4倍。甚至超越标准70B模型（35.2%），参数量减少8.75倍。发现检测-修正分离现象：错误检测AUC在14层最佳（0.718），但任务准确率在16层最佳（44.0% vs 29.2%）。

Conclusion: LPSR是一种高效的无训练推理时修正方法，通过监测残差流相位偏移检测和修正推理错误，显著提升数学推理性能，同时揭示了模型内部检测与修正的最佳深度不同的重要现象。

Abstract: Large language models frequently commit unrecoverable reasoning errors mid-generation: once a wrong step is taken, subsequent tokens compound the mistake rather than correct it. We introduce $\textbf{Latent Phase-Shift Rollback}$ (LPSR): at each generation step, we monitor the residual stream at a critical layer lcrit, detect abrupt directional reversals (phase shifts) via a cosine-similarity $+$ entropy dual gate, and respond by rolling back the KV-cache and injecting a pre-computed steering vector. No fine-tuning, gradient computation, or additional forward passes are required. LPSR achieves $\mathbf{44.0\%}$ on MATH-500 with an 8B model versus $28.8\%$ for standard AR ($+15.2$ pp; McNemar $χ^2 = 66.96$, $p < 10^{-15}$). Critically, prompted self-correction, the most natural inference-time baseline, scores only $19.8\%$, below standard AR; LPSR exceeds it by $+24.2$ pp ($χ^2 = 89.4$, $p \approx 0$). LPSR also outperforms Best-of-16 ($+7.8$ pp) at $5.4\times$ lower token cost, and surpasses a standard 70B model ($35.2\%$) with $8.75\times$ fewer parameters at ${\sim}3\times$ the token budget. A 32-layer sweep reveals a novel \textbf{detection-correction dissociation}: error-detection AUC peaks at layer~14 ($0.718$) but task accuracy peaks at layer~16 ($44.0\%$ vs.\ $29.2\%$), demonstrating that optimal monitoring depth differs for detection and correction.

</details>


### [911] [A multimodal and temporal foundation model for virtual patient representations at healthcare system scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18570)
*Andrew Zhang,Tong Ding,Sophia J. Wagner,Caiwei Tian,Ming Y. Lu,Rowland Pettit,Joshua E. Lewis,Alexandre Misrahi,Dandan Mo,Long Phi Le,Faisal Mahmood*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Apollo是一个多模态时序基础模型，整合了30年医院记录，包含250亿条记录、720万患者、28种医疗模态，学习统一表征空间，用于疾病预测、进展、治疗反应等322个临床任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代医学产生大量多模态数据，但现有模型无法整合临床记录的完整广度和时间深度，缺乏统一的患者表征。

Method: 训练多模态时序基础模型Apollo，整合30年纵向医院记录，学习统一表征空间（医疗概念图谱），将结构化非结构化事件压缩为虚拟患者表征。

Result: 在322个预后和检索任务上评估，展示Apollo嵌入的泛化临床预测能力，包括5年疾病风险预测、疾病进展、治疗反应等，特征归因显示预测与临床可解释多模态生物标志物一致。

Conclusion: Apollo建立了可计算医学的基础，使患者护理的完整背景可用于计算推理，实现多模态医学搜索引擎功能。

Abstract: Modern medicine generates vast multimodal data across siloed systems, yet no existing model integrates the full breadth and temporal depth of the clinical record into a unified patient representation. We introduce Apollo, a multimodal temporal foundation model trained and evaluated on over three decades of longitudinal hospital records from a major US hospital system, composed of 25 billion records from 7.2 million patients, representing 28 distinct medical modalities and 12 major medical specialties. Apollo learns a unified representation space integrating over 100 thousand unique medical events in our clinical vocabulary as well as images and clinical text. This "atlas of medical concepts" forms a computational substrate for modeling entire patient care journeys comprised of sequences of structured and unstructured events, which are compressed by Apollo into virtual patient representations. To assess the potential of these whole-patient representations, we created 322 prognosis and retrieval tasks from a held-out test set of 1.4 million patients. We demonstrate the generalized clinical forecasting potential of Apollo embeddings, including predicting new disease onset risk up to five years in advance (95 tasks), disease progression (78 tasks), treatment response (59 tasks), risk of treatment-related adverse events (17 tasks), and hospital operations endpoints (12 tasks). Using feature attribution techniques, we show that model predictions align with clinically-interpretable multimodal biomarkers. We evaluate semantic similarity search on 61 retrieval tasks, and moreover demonstrate the potential of Apollo as a multimodal medical search engine using text and image queries. Together, these modeling capabilities establish the foundation for computable medicine, where the full context of patient care becomes accessible to computational reasoning.

</details>


### [912] [When Can LLMs Learn to Reason with Weak Supervision?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18574)
*Salman Rahman,Jingyan Shen,Anna Mordvina,Hamid Palangi,Saadia Gabriel,Pavel Izmailov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了在弱监督下（稀缺数据、噪声奖励、自监督代理奖励）RLVR的成功条件，发现泛化能力由训练奖励饱和动态决定，推理忠实性是关键预测因素，而SFT和持续预训练结合可实现泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型能力增强，构建高质量奖励信号变得越来越困难，需要理解在弱监督下RLVR何时能成功，以应对实际应用中监督信号不足的挑战。

Method: 在多种模型家族和推理领域进行系统实证研究，分析三种弱监督设置：稀缺数据、噪声奖励和自监督代理奖励。研究训练奖励饱和动态，识别推理忠实性作为关键预测因素，并解构持续预训练和监督微调的贡献。

Result: 发现泛化能力由训练奖励饱和动态决定：能泛化的模型在训练奖励饱和前有较长的预饱和阶段，训练奖励和下游性能同步提升；快速饱和的模型则只是记忆而非学习。推理忠实性（中间步骤对最终答案的逻辑支持程度）是预测模型处于哪个阶段的关键属性，而输出多样性本身无信息量。

Conclusion: 在弱监督下实现泛化需要SFT显式推理轨迹，而持续预训练能放大这一效果。将这两种干预应用于Llama3.2-3B-Base模型，使其在原本失败的三种弱监督设置下都能实现泛化。

Abstract: Large language models have achieved significant reasoning improvements through reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR). Yet as model capabilities grow, constructing high-quality reward signals becomes increasingly difficult, making it essential to understand when RLVR can succeed under weaker forms of supervision. We conduct a systematic empirical study across diverse model families and reasoning domains under three weak supervision settings: scarce data, noisy rewards, and self-supervised proxy rewards. We find that generalization is governed by training reward saturation dynamics: models that generalize exhibit a prolonged pre-saturation phase during which training reward and downstream performance climb together, while models that saturate rapidly memorize rather than learn. We identify reasoning faithfulness, defined as the extent to which intermediate steps logically support the final answer, as the pre-RL property that predicts which regime a model falls into, while output diversity alone is uninformative. Motivated by these findings, we disentangle the contributions of continual pre-training and supervised fine-tuning, finding that SFT on explicit reasoning traces is necessary for generalization under weak supervision, while continual pre-training on domain data amplifies the effect. Applied together to Llama3.2-3B-Base, these interventions enable generalization across all three settings where the base model previously failed.

</details>


### [913] [Bounded Ratio Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18578)
*Yunke Ao,Le Chen,Bruce D. Lee,Assefa S. Wahd,Aline Czarnobai,Philipp Fürnstahl,Bernhard Schölkopf,Andreas Krause*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出BRRL框架和BPO算法，通过有界比率策略优化解决PPO理论与实践的脱节问题，确保单调性能提升，并在多个环境中优于PPO


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PPO已成为主流的on-policy强化学习算法，但其启发式裁剪目标与信任域方法理论基础之间存在显著脱节。本文旨在弥合这一差距，提供更理论严谨的框架。

Method: 提出BRRL框架，建立正则化和约束的策略优化问题并推导解析最优解。针对参数化策略类，开发BPO算法，最小化策略与BRRL解析最优解之间的优势加权散度。还扩展到GBPO用于LLM微调。

Result: 在MuJoCo、Atari和复杂IsaacLab环境（如Humanoid运动）中，BPO在稳定性和最终性能上通常匹配或优于PPO。GBPO在LLM微调任务中也优于GRPO。

Conclusion: BRRL框架和BPO算法成功弥合了PPO理论与实践的差距，提供了单调性能提升保证，并为理解PPO的成功提供了新的理论视角，同时连接了信任域策略优化和交叉熵方法。

Abstract: Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) has become the predominant algorithm for on-policy reinforcement learning due to its scalability and empirical robustness across domains. However, there is a significant disconnect between the underlying foundations of trust region methods and the heuristic clipped objective used in PPO. In this paper, we bridge this gap by introducing the Bounded Ratio Reinforcement Learning (BRRL) framework. We formulate a novel regularized and constrained policy optimization problem and derive its analytical optimal solution. We prove that this solution ensures monotonic performance improvement. To handle parameterized policy classes, we develop a policy optimization algorithm called Bounded Policy Optimization (BPO) that minimizes an advantage-weighted divergence between the policy and the analytic optimal solution from BRRL. We further establish a lower bound on the expected performance of the resulting policy in terms of the BPO loss function. Notably, our framework also provides a new theoretical lens to interpret the success of the PPO loss, and connects trust region policy optimization and the Cross-Entropy Method (CEM). We additionally extend BPO to Group-relative BPO (GBPO) for LLM fine-tuning. Empirical evaluations of BPO across MuJoCo, Atari, and complex IsaacLab environments (e.g., Humanoid locomotion), and of GBPO for LLM fine-tuning tasks, demonstrate that BPO and GBPO generally match or outperform PPO and GRPO in stability and final performance.

</details>


### [914] [Sessa: Selective State Space Attention](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18580)
*Liubomyr Horbatko*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Sessa是一种新型解码器架构，将注意力机制置于反馈路径中，实现循环多路径聚合，在长序列处理中展现出比Transformer和Mamba更强的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有序列模型存在局限性：Transformer的自注意力在长上下文中的影响会稀释（O(1/ℓ)），而结构化状态空间模型（如Mamba）的长距离敏感性会指数衰减。两者都只能通过单一路径检索或传播信息。

Method: 提出Sessa解码器，将注意力机制放置在反馈路径内部，实现循环多路径聚合。在特定假设下，Sessa能够实现幂律记忆尾（O(ℓ^{-β})），比Transformer的1/ℓ衰减更慢，且在扩散均匀路由设置中达到最优。

Result: 在匹配架构和训练预算下，Sessa在长上下文基准测试中表现最强，同时在短上下文语言建模中与Transformer和Mamba基线保持竞争力。

Conclusion: Sessa通过将注意力嵌入反馈路径，实现了比现有架构更优的长距离信息保留能力，为序列建模提供了新的设计范式。

Abstract: Modern sequence models are dominated by Transformers, where self-attention mixes information from the visible context in an input-dependent way. However, when retrieval is not sharp and attention remains diffuse over an effective support $S_{\mathrm{eff}}(t)$, the influence of any individual token is diluted, typically scaling as $O(1/S_{\mathrm{eff}}(t))$ and reaching $O(1/\ell)$ for old tokens in full-prefix settings. Structured state-space models process sequences recurrently through an explicit feedback path; selective variants such as Mamba make this feedback input-dependent, yet when freeze time cannot be sustained over long intervals, their long-range sensitivity decays exponentially with lag. Existing architectures therefore either retrieve from the past in a single read or propagate information through a single feedback chain. We introduce Sessa, a decoder that places attention inside a feedback path, enabling recurrent many-path aggregation within a layer. Under stated assumptions, Sessa admits regimes with a power-law memory tail in lag $\ell$ of order $O(\ell^{-β})$ for $0<β<1$, which is asymptotically slower than $1/\ell$; moreover, this rate is tight in an explicit diffuse uniform-routing setting where the influence is $Θ(\ell^{-β})$. Under the same conditions, only Sessa among the compared model classes realizes flexible selective retrieval, including non-decaying profiles. Empirically, under matched architectures and training budgets, Sessa achieves the strongest performance on our long-context benchmarks while remaining competitive with Transformer and Mamba style baselines on short-context language modeling.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [915] [Cooperative Coevolution versus Monolithic Evolutionary Search for Semi-Supervised Tabular Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16412)
*Jamal Toutouh*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种合作协同进化方法CC-SSL，用于极低标签率下的半监督表格分类，相比轻量级基线和单体进化基线，在1%标签数据下表现最佳。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在极低标签率（1%、5%、10%）下进行半监督表格分类的挑战，现有轻量级方法可能无法充分利用有限标签信息，需要更有效的进化方法。

Method: 提出合作协同进化方法CC-SSL，同时进化两个特征子集视图和伪标签策略，并与单体进化基线EA-SSL及三个轻量级SSL基线进行比较。

Result: 在25个OpenML数据集上，CC-SSL和EA-SSL的中位测试MacroF1均高于轻量级基线，在1%标签数据时差异最大。CC-SSL与EA-SSL最终性能统计上无显著差异，但EA-SSL在搜索过程中显示更高的适应度和多样性。

Conclusion: 合作协同进化方法在极低标签率的半监督表格分类中有效，与单体进化方法性能相当，但均优于轻量级基线，特别是在1%标签数据时优势明显。

Abstract: This paper studies semi-supervised tabular classification in the extreme low-label regime using lightweight base learners. The paper proposes a cooperative coevolutionary method (CC-SSL) that evolves (i) two feature-subset views and (ii) a pseudo-labeling policy, and compares it to a matched monolithic evolutionary baseline (EA-SSL) and three lightweight SSL baselines. Experiments on 25 OpenML datasets with labeled fractions {1%,5%,10%} evaluate test MacroF1 and accuracy, together with evolutionary and pseudo-label diagnostics. CC-SSL and EA-SSL achieve higher median test MacroF1 than the lightweight baselines, with the largest separations at 1% labeled data. Most CC-SSL vs. EA-SSL comparisons are statistical draws on final test performance. EA-SSL shows higher best-so-far fitness and higher diversity during search, while time-to-target is comparable and generations-to-target favors EA-SSL in several multiclass settings. Pseudo-label volume, ProbeDrop, and validation optimism show no significant differences between CC-SSL and EA-SSL under the shared protocol.

</details>


### [916] [Breaking Validity-Induced Boundaries to Expand Algorithm Search Space: A Two-Stage AST-Based Operator for LLM-Driven Automated Heuristic Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16420)
*Sun Shengming,Shi Jialong*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出两阶段基于结构的进化算子，通过AST操作生成多样结构变体，再用LLM修复为可执行代码，提升LLM-AHD的搜索能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM-AHD框架使用语义进化算子，完全依赖LLM预训练知识，要求生成代码必须有效，采用"思想-代码"表示，这种端到端生成限制了算法搜索空间的探索能力。

Method: 提出两阶段基于结构的进化算子：第一阶段直接在启发式代码的抽象语法树(AST)上进行交叉和变异，故意生成多样但可能无效的结构变体；第二阶段使用LLM将这些无效启发式修复为可执行的高质量代码。根据底层框架，原始无效变体或修复后的启发式被整合到种群中以保留潜在结构模式。

Result: 实验在旅行商问题(TSP)和在线装箱问题(OBP)上进行，结果表明该方法能显著提升最先进LLM-AHD算法(如EoH-S)的搜索能力，有效改善优化性能和收敛速度。

Conclusion: 两阶段基于结构的进化算子通过分离结构探索和代码修复，克服了传统端到端生成的限制，增强了LLM-AHD在算法搜索空间的探索能力。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) based automated heuristic design (AHD) has shown great potential in discovering efficient heuristics. Most existing LLM-AHD frameworks use semantic evolutionary operators that rely entirely on the LLM's pre-trained knowledge. These one-stage methods strictly require the generated code to be valid during the operation and often rely on a ``thought-code'' representation. We argue that this end-to-end generation fundamentally limits the exploration ability within the algorithm search space.
  In this paper, we propose a two-stage, structure-based evolutionary operator for LLM-AHD. In the first stage, our approach directly performs crossover and mutation on the Abstract Syntax Trees (ASTs) of the heuristic code, intentionally generating diverse but often invalid structural variants. In the second stage, the LLM is employed to repair these invalid heuristics into executable, high-quality code. Depending on the underlying framework, either the raw invalid variants or the repaired heuristics are integrated into the population to preserve potential structural patterns. We demonstrate that the proposed operator can significantly enhance the search ability of state-of-the-art LLM-AHD algorithms, such as EoH-S. Experimental results on the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) and the Online Bin Packing Problem (OBP) show that our method effectively improves both optimization performance and convergence speed.

</details>


### [917] [Fuzzy Encoding-Decoding to Improve Spiking Q-Learning Performance in Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16436)
*Aref Ghoreishee,Abhishek Mishra,Lifeng Zhou,John Walsh,Anup Das,Nagarajan Kandasamy*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出端到端模糊编码器-解码器架构，增强基于视觉的多模态深度脉冲Q网络在自动驾驶中的应用，解决脉冲强化学习中信息损失和表示能力有限的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决脉冲强化学习的两个核心限制：1）密集视觉输入转换为稀疏脉冲序列导致的信息损失；2）基于脉冲的价值函数表示能力有限，导致Q值估计区分度不足。

Method: 开发端到端模糊编码器-解码器架构：编码器使用可训练的模糊隶属函数生成表达性强的基于种群的脉冲表示；解码器使用轻量级神经解码器从脉冲输出重建连续Q值。

Result: 在HighwayEnv基准测试中，该架构显著提高了决策准确性，缩小了脉冲与非脉冲多模态Q网络之间的性能差距。

Conclusion: 该框架展示了脉冲神经网络在高效实时自动驾驶中的潜力，通过模糊编码器-解码器架构有效解决了脉冲强化学习的关键限制。

Abstract: This paper develops an end-to-end fuzzy encoder-decoder architecture for enhancing vision-based multi-modal deep spiking Q-networks in autonomous driving. The method addresses two core limitations of spiking reinforcement learning: information loss stemming from the conversion of dense visual inputs into sparse spike trains, and the limited representational capacity of spike-based value functions, which often yields weakly discriminative Q-value estimates. The encoder introduces trainable fuzzy membership functions to generate expressive, population-based spike representations, and the decoder uses a lightweight neural decoder to reconstruct continuous Q-values from spiking outputs. Experiments on the HighwayEnv benchmark show that the proposed architecture substantially improves decision-making accuracy and closes the performance gap between spiking and non-spiking multi-modal Q-networks. The results highlight the potential of this framework for efficient and real-time autonomous driving with spiking neural networks.

</details>


### [918] [Spike-driven Large Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16475)
*Han Xu,Xuerui Qiu,Baiyu Chen,Xinhao Luo,Xingrun Xing,Jiahong Zhang,Bo Lei,Tiejun Huang,Bo Xu,Guoqi Li*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: SDLLM提出了一种基于脉冲驱动的大型语言模型，通过稀疏加法操作替代密集矩阵乘法，显著降低推理能耗，同时保持任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受大脑信息处理机制启发，探索如何将脉冲驱动特性有效集成到LLM推理中。现有脉冲编码方案在LLM级别存在表示能力有限和稀疏性问题，难以实现仅依赖稀疏加法的十亿参数级脉冲驱动LLM。

Method: 提出SDLLM模型，采用即插即用的gamma-SQP两步脉冲编码方法，确保量化过程与模型语义空间对齐；引入对称量化下的双向编码和膜电位裁剪机制，显著降低脉冲发放率，同时将时间步数减半。

Result: 实验显示SDLLM显著降低推理成本，在脉冲范式下实现最先进的任务性能。相比先前脉冲LLM，能耗降低7倍，准确率提升4.2%。

Conclusion: SDLLM为下一代事件驱动神经形态芯片的架构设计提供了启示，展示了脉冲驱动LLM在保持性能的同时大幅降低能耗的潜力。

Abstract: Current Large Language Models (LLMs) are primarily based on large-scale dense matrix multiplications. Inspired by the brain's information processing mechanism, we explore the fundamental question: how to effectively integrate the brain's spiking-driven characteristics into LLM inference. Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) possess spike-driven characteristics, and some works have attempted to combine SNNs with Transformers. However, achieving spike-driven LLMs with billions of parameters, relying solely on sparse additions, remains a challenge in the SNN field. To address the issues of limited representational capacity and sparsity in existing spike encoding schemes at the LLM level, we propose SDLLM, a spike-driven large language model that eliminates dense matrix multiplications through sparse addition operations. Specifically, we use the plug-and-play gamma-SQP two-step spike encoding method to ensure that the quantization process aligns with the model's semantic space, mitigating representation degradation caused by binary spikes. Furthermore, we introduce bidirectional encoding under symmetric quantization and membrane potential clipping mechanisms, leading to spike trains with no or low firing counts dominating, significantly reducing the model's spike firing rate, while halving the number of time steps. Experimental results show that SDLLM not only significantly reduces inference costs but also achieves state-of-the-art task performance under the spike-based paradigm. For example, compared to previous spike-based LLMs, SDLLM reduces energy consumption by 7x and improves accuracy by 4.2%. Our model provides inspiration for the architecture design of the next generation of event-driven neuromorphic chips.

</details>


### [919] [Gradient-Free Continual Learning in Spiking Neural Networks via Inter-Spike Interval Regularization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16496)
*Samrendra Roy,Kazuma Kobayashi,Souvik Chakraborty,Sajedul Talukder,Syed Bahauddin Alam*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出ISI-CV，首个基于脉冲间隔变异系数的无梯度突触重要性度量，用于脉冲神经网络持续学习，在神经形态硬件上实现零遗忘


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于梯度的突触重要性方法（如EWC、SI）与不支持反向传播的神经形态硬件不兼容，需要开发无梯度的持续学习方法

Method: 使用脉冲间隔变异系数（ISI-CV）作为突触重要性度量：规律放电神经元（低CV）编码稳定任务相关特征受保护，不规则放电神经元可自由适应；仅需脉冲时间计数器和整数运算

Result: 在四个基准测试中表现优异：Split-MNIST和Split-FashionMNIST实现零遗忘，Permuted-MNIST接近零遗忘，在真实DVS数据上获得最高精度和最低遗忘；在N-MNIST上避免梯度方法的失败

Conclusion: ISI-CV是首个无梯度的SNN持续学习方法，完全兼容神经形态硬件，在多种任务上实现零遗忘或接近零遗忘，为动态环境中的实际部署提供了可行方案

Abstract: Continual learning, the ability to acquire new tasks sequentially without forgetting prior knowledge, is essential for deploying neural networks in dynamic real-world environments, from nuclear digital twin monitoring to grid-edge fault detection. Existing synaptic importance methods, such as Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC) and Synaptic Intelligence (SI), rely on gradient computation, making them incompatible with neuromorphic hardware that lacks backpropagation support. We propose ISI-CV, the first gradient-free synaptic importance metric for SNN continual learning, derived from the Coefficient of Variation (CV) of Inter-Spike Intervals (ISIs). Neurons that fire regularly (low CV) encode stable, task-relevant features and are protected from overwriting; neurons with irregular firing are permitted to adapt freely. ISI-CV requires only spike time counters and integer arithmetic, all of which are native to every neuromorphic chip. We evaluate on four benchmarks of increasing difficulty: Split-MNIST, Permuted-MNIST, Split-FashionMNIST, and Split-N-MNIST using real Dynamic Vision Sensor (DVS) event data. Across three seeds, ISI-CV achieves zero forgetting (AF = 0.000 +/- 0.000) on Split-MNIST and Split-FashionMNIST, near-zero forgetting on Permuted-MNIST (AF = 0.001 +/- 0.000), and the highest accuracy with the lowest forgetting on real neuromorphic DVS data (AA = 0.820 +/- 0.012, AF = 0.221 +/- 0.014). On N-MNIST, gradient-based methods produce unreliable importance estimates and perform worse than no regularization; ISI-CV avoids this failure by design.

</details>


### [920] [Impact of leaky dynamics on predictive path integration accuracy in recurrent neural networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.16547)
*Yanlin Zhang,Yan Zhang,Muhua Zheng,Kesheng Xu*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 论文提出在循环神经网络中引入泄漏项（leaky RNNs）来模拟多时间尺度动态，显著提升了网格细胞样表征的生成质量和路径整合精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实验证据表明内在多时间尺度动态与周期性空间活动的复杂性密切相关，但网格样放电模式中的路径整合信息如何在这些时间尺度上处理尚不清楚。

Method: 通过在RNNs中引入泄漏项形成leaky RNNs，从连续吸引子放电率模型离散化而来，创建自适应时间尺度。

Result: leaky RNNs显著增强了规则六边形放电模式的出现，相比普通RNNs产生更准确的位置估计和更可靠的网格细胞样表征，在相同噪声条件下表现出更稳定的动态和更清晰的网格结构。

Conclusion: 动态泄漏项作为低通滤波机制，保护循环神经回路免受噪声干扰，稳定网络动态，提高循环神经网络中的路径整合精度。

Abstract: Experimental evidence indicates that intrinsic temporal dynamics operating across multiple time scales are closely associated with the emergence of periodic spatial activity of increasing complexity. However, how information encoded in grid-like firing patterns for path integration is processed across these intrinsic time scales remains unclear. To address this question, we introduce adaptive time scales through a leak term in recurrent neural networks (RNNs), forming leaky RNNs discretized from the continuous attractors of firing rate models. Our results demonstrate that leaky RNNs substantially enhance the emergence of well-defined and highly regular hexagonal firing patterns. Compared with vanilla RNNs lacking a leak term, the trained leaky RNNs produce more accurate position estimates while generating reliable grid-cell-like representations. Furthermore, under identical noise conditions, leaky RNNs consistently exhibit more stable dynamics and better-defined grid structures. The learned dynamics also give rise to stable torus attractors with a clear central hole, supporting robust and regular grid-like activity. Overall, the dynamic leak acts as a low-pass filtering mechanism that protects recurrent neural circuitry from noise, stabilizes network dynamics, and improves path-integration accuracy in recurrent neural networks.

</details>


### [921] [Monotone but Exciting: On Evolving Monotone Boolean Functions with High Nonlinearity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17342)
*Claude Carlet,Marko Čupić,Marko Ðurasevic,Domagoj Jakobovic,Luca Mariot,Stjepan Picek*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 进化计算能够演化出非线性度明显优于多数函数且接近当前已知最佳值的单调布尔函数，但不同编码方式在性能上存在显著差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单调布尔函数是结构上重要的布尔函数类别，但其受限形式对可实现的非线性度有很强限制。研究进化计算能否演化出具有高非线性度的单调布尔函数（包括平衡和非平衡设置）。

Method: 使用三种解决方案编码：标准真值表表示、保持汉明权重的平衡真值表编码、基于符号树的遗传编程表示。引入非单调性惩罚来引导搜索朝向单调递增函数，并结合针对平衡性和非线性度的适应度函数。在维度n=5到n=14上进行实验。

Result: 进化搜索能够发现非线性度明显超过多数函数的单调布尔函数，并且在多个情况下接近当前已知的单调函数最佳值。实验显示编码方式之间存在显著差异：平衡真值表编码在较大维度上表现不佳，而标准真值表和遗传编程编码保持竞争力，遗传编程在最大测试维度中变得尤其重要。

Conclusion: 进化计算是演化高非线性度单调布尔函数的有效方法，但编码选择对性能有重要影响，遗传编程在更高维度问题上表现出优势。

Abstract: Monotone Boolean functions are a structurally important class of Boolean functions, but their restricted form imposes strong limitations on achievable nonlinearity. In this paper, we investigate whether evolutionary computation can evolve monotone Boolean functions with high nonlinearity, both in the balanced and imbalanced settings. We consider three solution encodings: the standard truth table representation, a balanced truth table encoding that preserves Hamming weight, and a symbolic tree-based genetic programming representation. To guide the search toward monotone increasing functions, we introduce a non-monotonicity penalty and combine it with fitness functions targeting balancedness and nonlinearity. Experimental results are reported for dimensions from $n=5$ to $n=14$. The results show that evolutionary search can discover monotone Boolean functions with nonlinearities clearly exceeding those of majority functions, and in several cases approaching the best currently known values for monotone functions. At the same time, the experiments reveal substantial differences between encodings: the balanced truth table encoding performs poorly for larger dimensions, while the standard truth table and genetic programming encodings remain competitive, with genetic programming becoming especially relevant in the largest tested dimensions.

</details>


### [922] [On Scalability of Multi-Objective Evolutionary Algorithms on Combinatorial Optimisation Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17872)
*Menghao Tang,Zimin Liang,Miqing Li*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 该研究通过实证分析发现，在组合优化问题中，简单MOEA（SEMO）随着问题规模增大收敛速度下降，而交叉操作能显著改善其大规模性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多目标进化算法（MOEAs）在连续问题上的可扩展性已有研究，但组合优化问题（MOCOPs）具有离散、刚性结构，导致算法行为不同。SEMO在MOCOPs上表现出色，但其在大规模问题上的表现尚不明确。

Method: 对MOEAs在组合优化问题上进行实证研究，问题规模从50到5000，比较SEMO、NSGA-II、SMS-EMOA和MOEA/D等算法的性能。

Result: SEMO随着维度增加收敛速度下降，表现不如其他MOEAs。缺乏交叉操作是SEMO在大规模问题上表现不佳的主要原因，加入交叉能显著加速收敛，但会损害解在Pareto前沿上的分布。

Conclusion: 对于大规模组合优化问题，简单的MOEA（如SEMO）需要交叉操作来保持竞争力，但需要在收敛速度和解分布之间权衡。

Abstract: Scalability of evolutionary algorithms refers to assessing how their performance changes as problem size increases. In the area of multi-objective optimisation, research on the scalability of multi-objective evolutionary algorithms (MOEAs) has predominantly focussed on continuous problems. However, multi-objective combinatorial optimisation problems (MOCOPs) differ from continuous ones. Their discrete and rigid structure often brings rugged landscape, numerous local optimal solutions and disjoint global optimal regions. This leads to different behaviour of MOEAs. For example, SEMO, a simple MOEA without mating selection and diversity maintenance mechanisms, has been shown to be highly competitive, and in many cases to outperform more sophisticated MOEAs on MOCOPs. Yet, it remains unclear whether such findings hold for large-scale cases. In this paper, we conduct an empirical investigation into the scalability of MOEAs on combinatorial problems, with problem size from 50 to 5,000. Our results show that SEMO experiences a decline in convergence speed as dimensionality increases, compared to other MOEAs such as NSGA-II, SMS-EMOA and MOEA/D. We further demonstrate that the absence of crossover is a major contributor to SEMO's underperformance in large-scale problems, and that incorporating crossover into SEMO can substantially accelerate convergence in general, despite being detrimental in spreading solutions over the Pareto front.

</details>


### [923] [Similarity-based Portfolio Construction for Black-box Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18196)
*Catalin-Viorel Dinu,Diederick Vermetten,Carola Doerr*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 该论文提出在固定预算的黑盒优化中使用算法组合策略，通过将评估预算分配给多个算法运行来降低风险并提高性能，优于传统的单一算法选择和虚拟最佳求解器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在黑盒优化中，为未知问题选择单一算法存在风险：选择器可能出错，且即使性能良好的算法也可能因方差大而在单次运行中表现不佳。需要一种更稳健的方法来应对这些不确定性。

Method: 提出序列算法组合方法，将评估预算分配给多个算法的多次运行。首先构建基于完整训练集的朴素组合，然后提出基于k最近邻的微调方法，为未见实例构建定制化组合。

Result: 朴素组合已经优于最强的传统基线（虚拟最佳求解器）。基于k最近邻的微调方法进一步提升了性能，证明了在固定预算黑盒优化中组合选择的有效性。

Conclusion: 算法组合策略通过方差减少和算法互补性，在固定预算黑盒优化中显著优于单一算法选择，为算法选择问题提供了更稳健的解决方案。

Abstract: In black-box optimization, a central question is which algorithm to use to solve a given, previously unseen, problem. Selecting a single algorithm, however, entails inherent risks: inaccuracies in the selector may lead to poor choices, and even well-performing algorithms with high variance can yield unsatisfactory results in a single run. A natural remedy is to split the evaluation budget across multiple runs of potentially different algorithms. Such sequential algorithm portfolios benefit from variance reduction and complementarities between algorithms, often outperforming approaches that allocate the entire budget to a single solver.
  While effective portfolios can be constructed post-hoc, transferring this idea to the algorithm selection setting is non-trivial. We show that a naive portfolio constructed over the full training set already outperforms the strongest traditional baseline, the virtual best solver. We then propose a simple yet effective k-nearest-neighbor-based finetuning approach to construct portfolios tailored to unseen instances, yielding further improvements and highlighting the effectiveness of portfolio selection in fixed-budget black-box optimization.

</details>


### [924] [Neutrally Evolving Interlocking Complexity in the Quandary Den](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18361)
*Andrew Walsh*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 该论文介绍了一种名为"Quandary Den"的人工生命模型，用于探索在没有更大信息需求的情况下复杂性增加的中性进化场景，发现了两种互锁复杂性机制


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分子生物学中存在许多蛋白质复合物以互锁方式协调完成不同功能。虽然适应性进化可以解释部分复杂性，但在中性解释足够时不应默认适应性进化。需要探索中性进化如何导致复杂性增加

Method: 引入新的人工生命模型"Quandary Den"，用于模拟不同中性进化场景，特别是在没有更大信息需求的情况下复杂性如何增加

Result: 发现了两种互锁复杂性场景：1) 亚功能化导致功能在复合物中扩散；2) 掩蔽允许复合物内干扰在遗传上积累，需要在表达水平上进行阻断

Conclusion: 中性进化可以解释分子生物学中观察到的复杂性增加，而不需要适应性压力。Quandary Den模型为理解中性进化如何导致互锁复杂性提供了新视角

Abstract: Molecular biology features numerous complexes of proteins that coordinate in an interlocking fashion to fulfill different functions. Adaptive evolution explains some of this complexity, but needn't be the default when neutral explanations suffice. A new artificial life model ``organism,'' the Quandary Den, is introduced to explore different neutral evolution scenarios where complexity increases in the absence of greater informational needs. Two interlocking complexity scenarios emerge. Subfunctionalization leads to functionality diffusing through the complex. Masking allows intracomplex interference to accumulate genetically, requiring that it be blocked at the level of expression.

</details>
